title: Credit Repair Operations Manager (4+ Years Experience Required)
description:
Credit Repair Specialist / Client Success & Operations Support



Our mission is simple: help people improve their credit profiles so they can unlock better financial opportunities.



This role is not just for someone who understands disputes. We need someone who is also confident speaking with clients, handling calls, guiding people through the process, and helping represent the business well on the front end. We don't want people who "just know credit repair," or those who have "heard about it." 



This is a great fit for someone who has real credit repair experience, communicates well over the phone (and is confident about it), stays organized, and can balance both client success and day-to-day operations support.



What You’ll Be Held Accountable With



- The person in this role should already be comfortable with the credit repair process and client communication, including:

- Reviewing and analyzing full credit reports from Experian, Equifax, and TransUnion

- Identifying inaccurate, outdated, unverifiable, or questionable negative items

- Preparing and managing dispute workflows

- Filing disputes with credit bureaus, creditors, and collection agencies

- Monitoring dispute progress and tracking responses

- Managing dispute cycles, timelines, and follow-ups

- Communicating with clients about progress, next steps, and expectations

- Conducting onboarding calls and client support calls

- Speaking confidently with leads or clients over the phone

- Helping answer questions and explain the process clearly

- Handling frustrated, confused, or upset clients in a calm and professional way

- Updating CRM systems with accurate notes, status updates, and follow-up actions

- Helping keep internal processes organized and moving efficiently



Required Experience



- Applicants should already have at least 4 years of hands-on credit repair experience and be familiar with most of the following:

-- Credit report analysis

-- Bureau dispute processes

-- Factual-based disputes

-- Section 609-style letters

-- Identity-related disputes

-- Collection account disputes

-- Charge-off disputes

-- Late payment dispute strategies

-- Debt validation requests

-- Goodwill letters

-- Credit utilization guidance

-- Understanding of FICO scoring factors

-- General understanding of CROA compliance



Note: We do not expect someone to use every single method listed above, but applicants should have strong working knowledge of most of them and be able to explain their actual process with confidence.



What We’re Looking For



- Has 4+ years of real credit repair experience

- Is comfortable on the phone and confident speaking with clients

- Can handle onboarding calls, support calls, and sales-related conversations

- Communicates clearly, professionally, and with empathy

- Can de-escalate irate or frustrated customers without becoming reactive

- Understands that client experience matters just as much as technical work

- Is organized and able to manage multiple client files and timelines

- Pays close attention to detail

- Is comfortable working remotely and without guidance, but can create results

- Can follow systems, document updates, and help support operations



How to Apply



If you have real credit repair experience and you’re confident both in the technical side and the client-facing side of the work, we’d love to hear from you.



Please include the following in your application:



1. ROO in your message

2. Your total years of credit repair experience

3. The tools, CRMs, or platforms you’ve used

4. A short description of your overall credit repair process

5. The specific dispute methods or approaches you’ve personally used

6. How you usually handle difficult, upset, or impatient clients

7. Your level of comfort with onboarding calls, client support calls, and phone communication



We’re excited to find someone who takes pride in doing this work the right way and can help support both our clients and our growing business.



Please ensure that you check the application process. Applicants with missing details and/or information will NOT be entertained.

title: Off-Page SEO and Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a highly skilled and proactive Off-Page SEO and Digital Marketing Specialist to join our team. Your primary objective will be to drive high-quality backlinks and improve the domain authority for two key websites, the primary one is the software company 
. Beyond traditional link building, we are looking for a versatile marketer who can expand our digital footprint through strategic partnerships, content distribution, and targeted outreach.



Primary Responsibilities (Off-Page SEO and Link Building)

Your core focus will be on executing a robust off-page SEO strategy to increase our search engine rankings and organic traffic.

•Strategic Link Building: Develop and execute a comprehensive backlink strategy focusing on high-authority, relevant websites in the coaching, leadership, and professional development niches.

•Guest Posting: Identify high-quality blogs and publications for guest posting opportunities. Pitch topics, coordinate content creation (or write it yourself), and secure placements with do-follow links.

•Resource Page Link Building: Find resource pages related to coaching and leadership and pitch our websites and specific articles for inclusion.

•Competitor Backlink Analysis: Analyze the backlink profiles of our top competitors to identify and replicate their most valuable link sources.

•Directory Submissions: Submit our websites to high-quality, niche-specific directories and local business listings where appropriate.



Additional Marketing Responsibilities

To maximize your impact, you will also be responsible for a variety of other digital marketing activities that support our overall growth goals.

•Strategic Partner Outreach: Identify and reach out to potential partners, such as other coaches, HR professionals, and industry influencers, to explore co-marketing opportunities, webinar collaborations, or affiliate relationships.

•Content writing and keyword research: Write high-quality, SEO-optimized articles, based on keyword analysis for our blogs and external publications. Repurpose existing content into different formats (e.g. turning a blog post into a LinkedIn article or a series of social media posts).

•Social Media Engagement: Actively participate in relevant online communities (e.g. LinkedIn groups, Reddit, specialized forums) to share our content, answer questions, and build brand awareness.

•Podcast & Interview Outreach: Pitch our key personnel as guests on relevant industry podcasts and interview series to build authority and secure high-value backlinks.

•Performance Tracking and Reporting: Monitor backlink acquisition, keyword rankings, and organic traffic growth using tools like Google Analytics, or similar. Provide regular reports on progress and ROI.



Requirements

•Proven experience as an Off-Page SEO Specialist or similar digital marketing role.

•Demonstrated success in acquiring high-quality backlinks through various white-hat techniques.

•Strong understanding of search engine algorithms and ranking factors.

•Excellent written and verbal English communication skills.

•Experience with SEO tools such as Ubersuggest, Ahrefs, SEMrush, Moz, or similar.

•Ability to work independently, manage multiple projects, and meet deadlines.

•A proactive and creative approach to problem-solving and marketing strategy.



How to Apply

Please submit your resume, a cover letter detailing your relevant experience, and examples of SEO projects you have successfully worked on in the past. Include the phrase "Growth Mindset" in your subject line so we know you read this description carefully.

title: Virtual Assistant – Sales & Lead Generation Specialist
description:
Company Overview:

We are a growing tablecloth and linen rental company serving events of all sizes—from intimate gatherings to large-scale weddings and corporate functions. We pride ourselves on high-quality products, reliable service, and helping our clients create unforgettable experiences.

Position Overview:

We are seeking a highly motivated and results-driven Virtual Assistant to support our sales efforts through cold calling, lead generation, and client outreach. This role is ideal for someone who is confident on the phone, fluent in American English speaking, reading and writing, organized, and experienced in identifying and converting new business opportunities.

Key Responsibilities:

• Conduct outbound cold calls to event planners, florists, decorators, venues, caterers, and corporate clients and more

• Identify and qualify new leads through online research and outreach

• Build and maintain a pipeline of prospective clients

• Follow up with leads via phone,
, and CRM systems

• Schedule appointments and coordinate sales calls for the owner/team

• Maintain accurate records of interactions and sales activity

• Assist in developing outreach scripts and improving sales processes

• Research local events, venues, and industry opportunities for partnerships

Qualifications:

• Proven experience in sales, telemarketing, or lead generation

• Excellent English communication skills (both spoken and written)

• Confident, persuasive, and professional phone presence

• Strong organizational and time management skills

• Ability to work independently and meet targets

• Familiarity with CRM tools

• Experience in event industry, rentals, or hospitality 

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs):

• Number of outbound calls made daily/weekly

• Number of qualified leads generated

• Appointments scheduled

• Conversion rate from lead to client

Work Hours & Compensation:

• Remote position (work from anywhere)

• Flexible hours (must overlap fully with U.S. business hours of 9:00am - 5:00pm)

• Compensation: Hourly rate starting at $4.00 and will increase based on performance + performance-based bonuses (based on leads and conversions)

Why Join Us?

• Opportunity to grow with a fast-expanding event rental business

• Flexible remote work environment

• Performance incentives and bonuses

• Supportive and collaborative team

How to Apply:

Please submit your resume along with a brief video introduction outlining your experience with cold calling and lead generation. Bonus points if you include a short voice recording or script sample demonstrating your sales approach.  

________________________________________

We are looking for someone who is proactive, persistent, and thrives on turning opportunities into real business. If that sounds like you, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Non QM Loan Processor - Assistant
description:
Funding is a U.S.-based private money lending company that provides short-term, asset-based loans to real estate investors. We focus on first- and second-position loans, bridge funding, gap funding, and creative real estate transactions.



We value clean execution, capital protection, and professional communication.



Role Overview



We are hiring a Loan Processor/ Jr. Underwriter to support real estate deals from intake through funding. This role is the operational backbone of our lending business and works directly with borrowers, brokers, and internal leadership.



This is not a bank mortgage role. You will support private money deals using CRM pipelines and internal workflows.



Key Responsibilities



Manage real estate deals inside the CRM.

Collect, organize, and review borrower and property documents.

Assist with preliminary deal review (LTV, ARV, exit strategy – no approvals)

Prepare deals for internal review and decision-making

Communicate with borrowers and brokers via
, phone, and chat

Request missing documents and follow up to keep deals moving

Coordinate with title companies and insurance providers for closings



Track conditions, timelines, and closing tasks

Maintain clean CRM records, notes, and document uploads

Assist with light lead follow-up and deal intake

Important Authority Boundaries







Requirements

2+ years experience in real estate transactions, loan processing, or lending support

Strong attention to detail and organization

Excellent written and spoken English

Comfortable communicating with U.S.-based clients

Ability to manage multiple deals at once

Experience using CRMs and pipeline-based systems



Nice to Have (Not Required):

Private money or hard money lending experience

Familiarity with real estate investing terminology

GoHighLevel or similar CRM experience



What Success Looks Like

Clean, accurate CRM records

Deals move smoothly with minimal rework

Borrowers feel informed and supported

Leadership does not need to fix or chase files



How to Apply

Please apply with:

Please submit your resume along with a brief introduction explaining your relevant experience and why you’re an excellent fit for this role. Include the word “Lending" in your application message so we know you read this fully.

title: AI Video Production Specialist  (Veo 3 + Nano Banana + ElevenLabs) Hiring Immediately
description:
AI Video Production Specialist



(Veo 3 + Nano Banana + ElevenLabs)

Hiring Immediately



About The Role



I run growing social media brands in the beauty and holistic health niche.



We create AI-generated holistic avatar short form content using:



• Google Flow (Veo 3)

• Nano Banana (AI image generation)

• ElevenLabs (AI voice generation)

• CapCut



Our content focuses on:



• Strong retention hooks

• Educational storytelling

• Consistent AI avatar identity

• Natural voice delivery

• Clean, minimal editing



I am looking for a full time AI Video Production Specialist who already has experience producing this style of content.



This is not an entry-level editing job.

You must already understand AI avatar workflows and retention-driven short form content.



I am hiring immediately.



Position Structure



Full time

Monday through Saturday

Flexible schedule as long as weekly production targets are met



Salary: $400–$500 USD per month (based on experience and skill level)



Performance-based bonuses will be provided when production targets, quality standards, and account growth milestones are consistently achieved.



Performance review after 3–6 months with opportunity for base salary increase and expanded responsibilities.



High performers who demonstrate ownership, consistency, and creative contribution will have long-term growth opportunities within the production team.



Production Expectations



We operate using a production unit system based on workload complexity.



• Full 90–120 sec Veo 3 holistic avatar build = 2 units

• 45–60 sec AI voice + Nano Banana + edit build = 1.5 units

• Simple AI voice build (minimal visuals) = 1 unit

• Hook-only variation / optimization = 0.5 unit



Weekly Target: 35–40 production units.



Some weeks will focus on full builds.

Other weeks will focus on hook testing and optimization.



Quality and attention to detail are required for every submission.



What You Will Do



• Generate Veo 3 clips using structured prompts

• Generate AI images using Nano Banana

• Generate voiceovers using ElevenLabs

• Maintain avatar consistency (voice, clothing, tone, pacing)

• Ensure holistic avatar style remains consistent across scenes

• Edit final builds in CapCut (clean, minimal style)

• Add captions accurately

• Followscript breakdowns precisely

• Double check all details before submission

• Maintain organized Google Drive workflow



In the future, you may:



• Improve hooks

• Suggest retention optimizations

• Assist in script refinement

• Manage the full AI production workflow from start to finish



Required Experience



• Proven experience creating holistic health AI avatar short form content

• Experience generating Veo 3 clips

• Experience using Nano Banana or similar AI image tools

• Experience generating voice using ElevenLabs

• Strong CapCut editing skills

• Strong English comprehension

• Strong attention to detail



You must understand avatar continuity, pacing, and short form viewer retention.



Huge Plus



• You already have active access to Google Flow (Veo 3)

• You already have access to ElevenLabs

• You already have access to Nano Banana

• You have managed full AI production workflows before



How To Apply



To be considered:



Send links to 3 holistic AI avatar style videos you personally created

Huge plus if you can share views your content has generated on IG/FB

List the AI tools you currently have access to

Share your internet speed

Tell me how many full 90–120 sec AI builds you can realistically complete in 8 hours

Briefly explain how you maintain avatar and voice consistency across multiple scenes



Include the word “HOLISTIC” in your message so I know you read everything.



Only applicants with relevant portfolio examples will be considered.



Hiring immediately.

title: Virtual Assistant-Bookkeeper (Manila Based Candidates Only)
description:
We are looking for an experienced Bookeepers to join our growing team.



The Role Overview



The successful candidate will play a key role in maintaining accurate financial records for a portfolio of clients. You will work closely with our accounting team in Ireland to ensure that bookkeeping tasks are completed accurately, efficiently, and in line with Irish and UK accounting standards.



This is an excellent opportunity for a highly organised professional who enjoys structured work, problem solving, and delivering high-quality financial information.

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

• Processing and posting purchase invoices and supplier payments

• Bank and credit card reconciliations

• Maintaining accurate purchase and sales ledgers

• Preparing bookkeeping schedules to support monthly management accounts

• Supporting VAT return preparation and reconciliation

• Investigating and resolving reconciliation differences

• Maintaining organised and well-documented financial records

• Communicating with internal teams regarding queries or missing information

• Supporting process improvements and workflow efficiencies

________________________________________

Key Skills & Experience



Technical Skills

-Strong understanding of double-entry bookkeeping (debits and credits)

-Excellent attention to detail and accuracy

-Experience with bank reconciliations and ledger management

-Good exposure to VAT processes

-Experience with accounting software such as:

o Xero

o QuickBooks Online

o Sage (desirable)

o Dext (desirable)



Professional Skills

Highly developed organisational skills

Strong time management and deadline management

Ability to prioritise tasks and manage multiple client workloads

Methodical and structured approach to completing work

Flexible and adaptable to changing priorities

Strong written and verbal communication skills

Excellent English language skills



Additional Requirements

-Understanding of Irish or UK business practices is highly desirable

-Ability to work effectively within a remote international team

-A proactive mindset with a strong sense of responsibility for work quality

-Currently residing in around Greater Manila area 

________________________________________

What We Offer

-Opportunity to join a growing international finance outsourcing firm

-A chance to become part of a pioneering Manila-based team

-Direct support and mentoring from our Ireland head office

-Ongoing training and professional development

-Opportunities for career progression and promotion as the team expands

-A collaborative and supportive team environment

-Stable weekday working hours (11 AM – 7 PM) with weekends off

________________________________________

Who This Role Would Suit



This role is ideal for an experienced bookkeeper who enjoys structured financial work, takes pride in accuracy, and wants to be part of a growing international finance team.



You will thrive in this position if you are detail-oriented, reliable, organised, and committed to producing high-quality financial records.

title: Creative Strategist (Direct Response | Meta Ads | DTC Supplements)
description:
---About the Role---



We run a fast-growing DTC brand in the health and wellness space, primarily selling supplements through paid traffic. Our business is driven by direct response marketing. When we find winning creatives, revenue scales immediately.



We are hiring a high-level Creative Strategist whose work directly impacts performance. This is not a design role. This is not a social media role. This is a research and strategy role where your thinking determines what gets tested and what wins.



You will be responsible for deeply understanding the customer, identifying market opportunities, and producing clear, high-converting creative briefs for our media buying and production teams.



This is a long-term role with real ownership. Your output will be measured by performance.



---Core Responsibilities---



Conduct deep market research on customer avatars, pain points, desires, objections, and buying triggers

Identify sub-avatars and new angles that competitors are missing

Analyze winning and losing ads to understand why they worked or failed (feedback loops)

Develop strong hooks and concepts based on proven direct response principles

Write structured creative briefs for video editors and designers

Continuously generate new testing ideas based on data and research

Track performance and refine strategy based on results

Stay updated on market trends, competitor messaging, and emerging angles

Flag patterns, opportunities, and risks to the team



---Requirements---



Minimum 2 to 3 years working with DTC ecommerce brands running paid traffic

Proven experience in direct response marketing, not brand awareness marketing

Strong understanding of customer psychology and buying behavior

Deep familiarity with concepts from:



Breakthrough Advertising by Eugene Schwartz

Customer awareness levels

Market sophistication

Pain points and desire mapping

Offer positioning

Hook development

Angle testing



Experience analyzing Meta ads and identifying winning patterns

Ability to produce structured, actionable creative briefs

Strong research skills and attention to detail

Excellent written English

Self-directed and able to operate without constant supervision



---This Role Is NOT for You If---



You are new to direct response marketing

You mostly create content for social media engagement

You rely on trends instead of research

You need step-by-step instructions for every task

You cannot explain why an ad works

You have never worked in a performance-driven environment



---What Success Looks Like---



Consistently generating strong testing angles

Producing clear, high-quality creative briefs

Maintaining a high hit rate on tested creatives

Identifying new opportunities before competitors

Contributing directly to revenue growth



---Compensation---



We pay extremely competitive rates for high performers.



Base pay depends on experience and performance.

Performance bonuses are tied to results.



If your ideas produce winners, you will be rewarded accordingly.



---Why This Role Matters---



This is not a support role.

This is not a content role.

This is a revenue-driving role.



The quality of your research determines the quality of our tests.

The quality of our tests determines the growth of the business.



---To Apply---



Fill this form:

title: Remote Video Editor
description:
Who We Are:



CST Media Productions is a real estate media company based in Central New York State. We specialize in providing cutting-edge visual solutions to real estate professionals, including high-quality photography, video tours, and a comprehensive suite of media marketing materials to elevate their online presence.



How You Will Contribute:



We are in search of a skilled and creative Real Estate Video Editor to join our team.  As an editor for CST Media Productions, you will be responsible for creating compelling and visually engaging video content that aligns with our media services.  You’ll handle standard profile and log footage, as well as both ground-level and aerial footage, delivering a range of video types such as:

Home-tour highlight videos

Agent home walkthroughs (on/off camera)

Closing day reels

Client testimonials

Realtor’s event recaps

Interview-style videos for social media

Agent talking head style ads for our clients

Short form content tailored for platforms such as Instagram reels, TikTok, and YouTube shorts



What You’ll Be Doing:



Coordinate with our team manager and social media manager to follow project requirements, objectives, and target delivery.

Monitor our Project Management System (Spiro) for new job assignments

Meet project deadlines and manage editing projects simultaneously, as needed.

Submit edited footage to the Team Manager for review and approval

Upload final videos to our clients through Spiro/Dropbox

Incorporate feedback and finalize the video with any necessary revisions

Collaborate with the team to brainstorm and contribute innovative ideas to develop our video content strategy

Keep up to date, suggest, and incorporate trending video concepts and developments for real estate media videos.



What We’re Looking For:



Proficiency is Adobe Premier preferred, but not required. Open to Davinci/Final Cut Pro if you’re using that.  

Excellent English (both verbal and written)

Attention to detail is a must

Looking for someone who is familiar with:

Current real estate video editing trends

Color grading LOG footage (specifically Clog 3 right now)

Creative transitions/masking transitions

Higgsfield AI - mostly for AI virtual staging, day to night style effects, season conversions, etc.  

Understanding sound design

Familiar with premium captions/masking

Able to handle multiple tasks at once and stay on schedule with our delivery timelines



We are looking for someone to be a part of our team!  This is accomplished by staying on top of current real estate media trends, contributing ideas and feedback to help make our videos even better!  We want someone that is willing to do more than just the standard, we are looking for someone to help us stand out!



We are looking to onboard someone fairly soon in preparation for the busier season coming up.



A test edit will be required with your application. Below is a link to the RAW files for a recent shoot that we did. There are opportunities for day to night conversions, door openings, and other creative FPV shots. You don’t need to put together an entire length of video.  30 - 45 seconds will do, just as long as it’s enough to show how you would color grade, music selection, sound design, and most importantly how creative you can be!  Have fun with it.  Please
 a link to the completed test edit in your application to be considered.



Instructions for the video:

Address:  123 Anyplace Lane, Syracuse NY

Cinematic look and feel. Color grading a priority. Ok to have deeper shadows for a more “Moody” feel if it works.

At least one day to night transition

At least one door opening

At least one premium text of agent talking

The clips are from a previous shoot that we did. Feel free to watermark your video if you like.



Clips are at the link below! Use as many or little as you need to feel confident on what you are sending.



Sample Raw Video Clips:







Samples of what we are looking to get back:

Sample 1:





Sample 2:





Sample 3:





We strive to stay on top of current trends and always be innovating and putting out the best possible product for our clients. Our video is a large part of what drives new business to us!



We are looking to grow this into a full time position.





To apply for this position, please include:

Resume

High speed internet

Snapshot of internet speed test

Video intro (including why you want to work at CST Media Productions in your video)

Video sample



Send

title: video editor for social media posts - (seeking a superstar in organic reach)
description:
We need someone to create 2 short videos a day for our company and 2 sets of before and after slides of our work per day. - we post these on social media.



You would be given access to our photo and video files of work we are doing and create an entertaining video, with catchy thumbnail and intro, these videos will be between 10 and 30 seconds, your KPI will be organic reach across the platforms we use (insta, tiktok, reels, linkedin, YT) - we use metricool for cross posting and scheduled posting and you would be required to create enough for 2 per day - with captions.  the requirement is that you are always posting 2 weeks ahead, so you could do this at any time that suits you. - full details will be provided 



You will be required to carefully analyse what is working and gaining traction and continually iterate and improve the rankings.



If you are interested,, please provide 

1) a link or links  to similar work you have done where you have created videos that have gained organic traction.

2) brief summary of how you acheived the results on the social videos you created

3) references will be asked for and checked of projects you have worked on and achieved success with on organic reach, - so if we proceed with your application and you are willing we would ask your permission to directly contact and seek references from companies you have created videos for, if you are not comfortable with this, please do not apply





Please note, the hourly pay is a guideline, this will be a per video payment.



The KPI is organic reach and you will receive bonuses for increasing our reach and impact

suitable candidates will be asked to attend a video meeting.







Thanks so much for reading!

You produce more, you earn more.



?



DO NOT APPLY IF

	•	You only know basic GoHighLevel

	•	You avoid follow-up or sales

	•	You need step-by-step instructions

	•	You are slow, inconsistent, or reactive



?



WE ARE LOOKING FOR

	•	Speed

	•	Ownership

	•	Problem-solver

	•	Revenue mindset



?



PROVE IT



Do not send resume only.



Send:

	1.	Example of a funnel or workflow you built in GoHighLevel

	2.	3 Reel ideas that would drive bookings

	3.	One message you would send to a lead who didn’t respond

	4.	Your plan to fill 10 empty appointment slots in one day



?



FINAL WORD



We don’t hire based on talk.

We hire based on execution.



If you can build in GoHighLevel AND generate bookings, you will win here.



If not, keep scrolling.

title: Recruitment Co-Ordinator
description:
We are a UK-based care home group operating multiple residential and nursing homes. We are looking for a highly organised and proactive Recruitment Coordinator to take full ownership of recruitment and onboarding across the group.



This is a hands-on role requiring strong communication, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple tasks daily.



 Key Responsibilities



 1. Daily Recruitment Coordination

Contact each care home manager daily to:

Identify current staffing requirements

Track candidates in the pipeline

Review outcomes of recent interviews

Provide a daily summary
 to Directors outlining:

Vacancies per home

Pipeline status

Any risks or urgent staffing gaps



 2. Job Advert Management

Review and manage all job listings across platforms (Indeed,
, etc.)

Ensure all adverts are:

Active

Accurate

Relevant to current vacancies

Update or remove outdated listings



 3. Candidate Screening & Interviews

Review all incoming applications

Invite suitable candidates to an initial interview (conducted by you)

Conduct structured interviews and assess suitability

Prepare clear interview notes and recommendations

Progress strong candidates to final interview with the care home manager



 4. Onboarding & Compliance

Once approved by the manager:

Prepare all required legal and compliance documentation

Create a complete staff file in our internal system

Ensure all onboarding steps are completed before start date

Liaise with managers to ensure smooth onboarding



5. Recruitment File Auditing (CRITICAL)

Audit recruitment files across all care homes to ensure full compliance

Identify missing or incomplete documents

Proactively chase:

Applicants

Managers

Ensure all staff files meet UK regulatory requirements (CQC standards) (you will get training)



6. Support the UK Payroll team in day to day work



 Requirements

Excellent written and spoken English

Strong organisational and communication skills

High attention to detail (non-negotiable)

Experience in recruitment, HR, or administration preferred

Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities

Comfortable working with UK-based teams and systems



???? Working Hours

Full-time

Must overlap with UK working hours

title: Full time AI video creator
description:
Hiring: AI Content Creation VA (Short-Form Video)



We are a social media content company that creates short-form video content for health and wellness brands on Instagram. We use AI tools to generate images, voiceovers, talking head videos, and motion clips, then edit everything together into finished Instagram Reels.



This is a long-term position, not a one-time project.



What you will be doing:



- Using AI tools to generate realistic images of characters (Nano Banana Pro)

- Generating natural sounding voiceovers (ElevenLabs)

- Creating talking head videos (HeyGen)

- Generating motion video clips (Google Veo 3)

- Editing everything together into polished short-form videos (CapCut or your preferred editing software)

- Using Claude AI to write prompts and improve your work quality



You do not need prior experience with these specific tools. We have a full 9-stage onboarding program that trains you on everything step by step. But you do need to be someone who learns fast and pays attention to detail.



What we are looking for:



- Reliable and consistent. You show up every day and communicate if something comes up. This is the number one thing we care about.

- Detail-oriented. The difference between a good video and a bad one comes down to small details.

- Coachable. You take feedback seriously and apply it to your next video.

- Has their own laptop or desktop computer with a stable internet connection.

- Has their own video editing software (CapCut works great).

- Can follow instructions carefully without needing to be told the same thing twice.



Schedule:



Monday through Saturday. Daily check-in at 9:00 AM PHT. All work for the day must be completed and submitted by 9:00 PM PHT.



Pay:



$500 per month.



Onboarding:



Before you start producing content, you will go through our 9-stage onboarding program. Onboarding is unpaid but mandatory and must be completed within 7 days. This deadline is non-negotiable. It is designed to fully prepare you so you can do the job at a high level from day one. If onboarding is not completed within 7 days we will not be moving forward.



To apply:



Do not just send me a message saying you are interested. To be considered for this position you must complete the following test assignment and include it in your application:




  



Applications without the completed assignment will not be reviewed. This is how we filter for people who actually pay attention and follow instructions.



If you have any questions about the role, include them in your message along with your completed assignment.



Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: I'm looking for driving videos

title: Viral Short Form Editor
description:
Short-Form Video Editor (CapCut / DaVinci Resolve) — Performance-Based | Remote

We're looking for a talented and strategic short-form video editor who understands why videos go viral and knows how to engineer that outcome from the edit suite.



This role supports multiple clients across personal brand and faceless content, so if you thrive in a fast-paced, high-volume environment and want income that scales with your output, this is the role for you.



What You'll Be Doing

* Editing 15–20 short-form videos per day (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)

* Working across personal brand/talking head and faceless content formats

* Applying hooks, pacing, captions, sound design, and transitions that drive retention and shares

* Contributing strategic input on why content performs — not just executing edits

* Collaborating with our team to improve content performance across client accounts



You're the Right Fit If You...

* HAVE DIRECTLY EDITED AT LEAST ONE INSTAGRAM REEL THAT CROSSED 1 MILLION VIEWS (Must be able to show it)

* Were involved in the strategy behind that content's success — not just the technical edit

* Are highly proficient in CapCut and DaVinci Resolve

* Can maintain quality and speed at 15–20 edits per day without sacrificing output

* Communicate clearly and hit deadlines without being chased

* Are comfortable being paid per client, with real earning potential as we grow



Compensation

This is a performance-based, per-client role — meaning your income grows as we bring on more clients. Strong editors who deliver results will always have more work and more earning opportunity here.



How to Apply

To be considered, please send:

1. A link to the Reel (or Reels) you edited that hit 1M+ views

2. A brief explanation of what you believe made it perform — hooks, format, audio, strategy, etc.

3. Your current editing speed (avg. edits per day) and the tools you use daily

Applications without a 1M+ view example will not be reviewed.

title: YOU TUBE THUMBNAIL DESIGNER
description:
???? YouTube Thumbnail Designer (CTR-Focused Only)



We’re looking for a top-tier YouTube thumbnail designer who understands one thing:



???? If it doesn’t get clicks, it doesn’t matter.



This is a performance role, not a “make it look nice” role.



If you don’t understand CTR, scroll speed, and why people click… this isn’t for you.



???? What You’ll Do

Design high-CTR YouTube thumbnails

Turn titles + ideas into simple, bold, curiosity-driven visuals

Create multiple variations for testing

Improve thumbnails based on performance data

???? What You MUST Have

A strong portfolio of YouTube thumbnails (not general design work)

Clear understanding of what makes people click

Advanced Photoshop skills (cutouts, lighting, contrast, composition)

Ability to make thumbnails that are instantly readable on mobile

???? Do NOT Apply If:

You mainly design logos, posters, or social media graphics

You focus on making things “look nice” instead of getting clicks

You don’t understand YouTube or watch it regularly

? You’re a Good Fit If:

You study creators like MrBeast, Alex Hormozi, or Ali Abdaal

You think in hooks, curiosity, and emotion

You’ve made thumbnails that actually performed

???? Details

Ongoing work available

Per-thumbnail or monthly rate (depending on experience)

Fast turnaround preferred

? To Apply (IMPORTANT)



Start your proposal with:



???? “CTR is everything”



Then include:



Links to your best performing thumbnails

Your process for designing a thumbnail

Answer this in one sentence:

???? Why do people click a thumbnail?

???? Final Note



Most people will apply for this.



Very few will actually be good enough.



If you know you’re in that top tier, apply.

title: Call Center Manager
description:
We're a leading ophthalmology practice in the Chicagoland area, providing exceptional eye care services with state-of-the-art technology and clinically advanced procedures. Dedicated to improving vision quality, the practice offers a full range of services for patients of all ages, including cataract surgery, pediatric eye care, glaucoma treatment, dry eye management, diabetic eye care, LASIK, laser vision correction, eyeglasses, and contact lenses. With locations in Oak Lawn, Chicago, Orland Park, and Buffalo Grove, the practice is committed to delivering friendly, efficient, and professional care for both routine and specialized eye care needs.



Role Description:

We are seeking a full-time, Call Center Manager for our Phillipines Market. The Call Center Manager will oversee daily operations of the call center, ensuring high levels of customer satisfaction and operational efficiency. Responsibilities include managing and mentoring call center staff, monitoring performance metrics, implementing process improvements, and addressing customer inquiries or concerns. The manager will also analyze call center data to optimize workflows, maintain quality standards, and collaborate with other departments to meet organizational goals.





Qualifications:

Expertise in Contact Center Management with a proven ability to oversee and optimize call center operations

Must know how to manage a team and have experience with GOTO connect

Strong skills in Customer Satisfaction and handling customer inquiries in a professional and courteous manner

Proficiency in Team Management and leading staff toward achieving performance targets

Excellent Communication skills, including the ability to communicate effectively with both tea
mbers and patients

Exceptional Analytical Skills for monitoring call center metrics and implementing data-driven improvements

Previous management experience in a healthcare or service-oriented industry is a plus

Proficiency in call center software and related technologies

Bachelor’s degree in business administration, management, or a related field is preferred

title: UI/UX Designer — Web & App
description:
We're a small but fast-moving team building software and websites for real businesses — e-commerce brands, manufacturers, service companies, and makers. You'll design across a range of projects: marketing websites, web applications, client portals, landing pages, and mobile interfaces. The work is varied, the bar is high, and you'll have real creative input.



What you'll actually do:

Design marketing websites, landing pages, and web applications from concept to final handoff

Create UI designs in Figma with clean component systems and thoughtful UX

Work directly with developers to ensure designs are implemented accurately

Stay current on design trends and bring fresh ideas to every project

Reference and draw inspiration from sites like Mobbin, Godly, Awwwards, and Land-book — and actually apply what you see



You're a strong fit if you:

Have a portfolio that shows genuine design taste — not just competent layouts but real aesthetic sensibility

Obsess over typography, spacing, and motion details

Know the difference between a good design and a great one and can articulate why

Can design for both marketing (conversion-focused) and product (usability-focused) contexts

Are comfortable working independently with minimal direction once you understand the brief

Follow designers and studios you admire and actively study what makes their work work



Tools we use:

Figma (required), Notion, Slack. Familiarity with Next.js/Tailwind output is a plus — you don't need to code but knowing what's easy vs. hard to implement makes you a better designer.



This is not the right role if you:

Rely on templates without pushing them further

Think good design is just making things look clean

Can't explain the reasoning behind your layout and typography choices

Haven't visited Awwwards or Godly in the last month



What we offer:

Consistent work across multiple client projects

Real creative latitude — we want your eye, not just your execution

A team that actually cares about design quality





How to apply

Send your portfolio and a short note (3-5 sentences) telling us: what's a site or app you've seen recently that impressed you, and why?

title: Digital Marketing Agency Operations and Content VA
description:
Marketing Agency Operations and Content VA



 JOB OVERVIEW

Job Type: Full-Time | Remote

Schedule: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST

Salary: $1,000 – $1,500/month (based on experience)



About the Role

We are looking for an operationally sharp, tech-forward Virtual Assistant to join our team. This role supports a fast-paced digital marketing environment where you will handle project management, content scheduling, inbox management, and client coordination. No two weeks look exactly alike.

This is not a generalist VA role. You will be deeply embedded in day-to-day operations and are expected to hit the ground running from day one.



What You'll Do



Manage client tasks, folders, and project documentation in Teamwork

Track follow-ups and deadlines across multiple client accounts

Set up and maintain client content calendars in Google Sheets

Schedule weekly blogs in WordPress (WP Engine) including image selection and upload

Schedule and manage social media posts across platforms using Metricool

Prepare and distribute client meeting agendas

Manage the executive inbox and general support inbox

Coordinate team scheduling and calendar management

Maintain organized client folders in Google Drive

Review and lightly edit AI-generated blog content for quality and consistency

Use ChatGPT and other AI tools daily to improve speed and accuracy

Support creative tasks such as Canva thumbnail creation



Requirements



Hands-on experience with Teamwork, Asana, or 

Experience with Metricool or a strong alternative (Buffer, Hootsuite)

Prior experience working inside a marketing or creative agency

Fluent, professional English with exceptional written accuracy

Strong Google Drive proficiency (Docs and Sheets)

Comfortable using AI tools (ChatGPT or similar) as part of daily work

Available Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM–5:00 PM PST without schedule conflict

Fast, accurate typist with strong attention to detail





Bonus Points



HubSpot newsletter experience

Adobe Acrobat / PDF editing

WordPress or WP Engine experience

Eye for design and on-brand image selection

Canva graphics experience



Compensation & Benefits



$1,000 – $1,500/month based on experience

Bi-weekly pay

15 paid days off annually

Performance-based bonuses

Fully remote, long-term role



To Apply

Send your updated resume and a 1-minute video introduction (Loom or similar) telling us your name, your experience with Teamwork, Asana, or 
 and Metricool (or similar tools), and why this role is a great fit for you.

title: Social Media Digital Marketer (Sales)
description:
Please do not reply if you don’t have the experience requested



Role Essence: The Primary Revenue-Driving Link & Trusted Advisor



Primary Focus: Identifying Prospects, Nurturing Relationships, and Closing Deals



Work Hours: 12:00 PM – 8:30 PM EST, 30 minute unpaid lunch (Monday – Friday)



Starting Rate: $6.00 / hour



Performance Escalation: Upon successfully meeting all primary production and revenue targets in Month 1, you will receive a $100.00/month raise starting in Month 2.



Ongoing Incentive: An additional $1.00/hour bonus for every week you meet your specific production and revenue targets.



1. The Mission

At Sheila M Coaching, we don’t just "post content"—we change lives. As our Social Media Digital Marketer, you represent the Sheila M brand, gathering market intelligence and acting as a trusted advisor to help clients solve problems. You are identifying prospects and nurturing relationships until they are ready for a breakthrough.



2. Core Responsibilities & Partnership

Prospect Identification & Research: Use social platforms (LinkedIn, Pinterest, TikTok) to research and identify women navigating toxic loops and identity crises.



Relationship Cultivation: Act as a trusted advisor in the DMs and online communities, providing empathetic, faith-inspired guidance.



Total Brand Sales Authority: Working in partnership with Sheila M, you drive revenue across the entire ecosystem: RRRT, Private Coaching, Empowerment Hub, and Ecommerce.



The Digital Handshake: Own the GoHighLevel (CC360) Conversations Tab. Greet every lead with professional gravitas and ensure no woman is left waiting.



Pipeline Management: Maintain accurate records in the CRM, tagging leads to ensure the technical architecture is optimized.



3. Performance, Pay & Benefits

The "Until It's Done" Ethic: You take full ownership of your revenue and production goals.

Payment Terms: Bi-weekly pay (paid in arrears). Period ends Friday; payment clears by Wednesday.

Probationary Period: This role has a 90-day probationary period. Part-time workers are not paid for holidays. No paid holidays will be granted until the probationary period is successfully completed.



4. How to Apply

Lead Identification: What is your specific experience identifying and qualifying potential customers on platforms like LinkedIn or TikTok?



Conversion Example: Provide a specific example of how you have engaged on social media within groups or communities and successfully converted that interaction into a paying client/customer.



The Trusted Advisor: How do you balance being a "trusted advisor" who helps solve problems with the practical need to close a sale?



Logistics: Can you commit to the 12:00 PM – 8:30 PM EST window? 



What is your backup plan for internet or power outages?



Vision: Where do you aspire to be professionally in 5 years?



If you are interested in applying, please write sunshine on the top of your response. 



Best wishes,

Sheila M

title: Executive Assistant (S-Tier | 5+ Years Experience Required)
description:
*** IMPORTANT: To be considered, begin your application with the phrase "I read the whole thing." Applications that skip this will not be reviewed. This is our first test of attention to detail. ***



---



We are a fast-moving, high-output operation and we need an executive assistant who is truly exceptional — someone who thinks three steps ahead, communicates with precision, and treats their work as a craft.



This is not an entry-level support role. You will be the operational backbone of the executive's day, owning the calendar, inbox, travel, and projects with full autonomy and minimal supervision.



Our team already includes three full-time Filipino staff who've been with us for years. We invest in our people and this role is no different.



---



WHAT YOU WILL OWN

- Full calendar management — scheduling, prioritization, and protecting deep work time

- Inbox triage and
 drafting with minimal direction, often representing the executive's voice

- Travel logistics end-to-end: flights, hotels, ground transport, visas, itineraries

- Meeting prep — agendas, briefing notes, pre-reads, and follow-up action tracking

- Project coordination across multiple stakeholders and time zones

- Research and synthesis: vendor comparisons, market briefs, due diligence support

- Document creation: SOPs, presentations, reports, and internal communications

- Personal task support: family logistics, appointments, gift sourcing, and ad hoc requests

- Process improvement — you will identify inefficiencies and propose solutions unprompted



MUST-HAVES

- 5+ years as an EA, VA, or operations role supporting senior leadership

- Excellent written English — you write clean, professional
s

- Mastery of Google Workspace or Microsoft 365

- Experience with project management tools (Notion, Asana, ClickUp, or similar)

- Consistent availability during US Eastern business hours (at least 4-hour overlap)

- Reliable internet — 25 Mbps minimum, with a backup connection

- Proactive communicator — you do not wait to be asked for an update

- Extreme discretion with confidential information



STRONG BONUSES

- Experience supporting founders, C-suite, or entrepreneurs

- Familiarity with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Notion AI)

- Bookkeeping or light finance background

- Experience with CRM platforms (HubSpot, Salesforce)

- Prior work with US, UK, or Australian clients



WHAT SEPARATES S-TIER CANDIDATES

The best assistants we've worked with share qualities that cannot be trained:

- They catch errors before we do — in documents, schedules, and logic

- They give a recommendation, not just options, when asked for input

- They own mistakes immediately and fix them without being asked twice

- They protect the executive's attention as if it were their own most valuable resource



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

- 13th month bonus after 6 months

- 10 days paid time off annually, increasing with tenure

- Performance annual review and expected raise yearly

- Long-term role — we do not churn assistants



HOW TO APPLY

We read every application. Follow these steps exactly:



1. Begin your cover letter with: "I read the whole thing."

2. In 3-5 sentences, describe the most complex scheduling or logistical challenge you have solved for an executive.

3. List the tools you use daily and rate your proficiency (1-5) in each.

4. Share your internet speed (upload + download) and your backup plan if your primary connection goes down.

5. Tell us your available hours and how much overlap you can offer with US Eastern Time.



Shortlisted candidates will complete a short skills assessment before the interview. The full process takes about one week.

title: Video Editor (DTC Skincare)
description:
Job Title: Video Editor (DTC Skincare) – Work Directly with Founder.

RINEN. is a Singapore-based DTC skincare brand looking for a creative, fast-paced, and independent Video Editor to help us scale our social media presence. You will work directly with our founder, Vanessa, to turn raw footage into high-converting, viral-style content for TikTok and Instagram.



The Role & Workflow

Assets: We provide A-roll, B-roll, scripts, and voiceovers via Google Drive.



Your Task: Filter the best assets, stitch them together, add captions, and create engaging 1–3 minute videos optimized for Instagram and TikTok.



Tools: You must be proficient in CapCut.



Speed: We move fast. First drafts are expected within 24 hours of receiving assets.



Volume: 5 videos per week.



Requirements

Experience: At least 2 years of professional video editing experience.



Social Media Savvy: You have a "gut feel" for what makes a video go viral (pacing, hooks, captions).



Independence: Since this is a remote role, you must be a self-starter who can manage your own time and hit deadlines without being chased.



Communication: High level of English proficiency to work closely with the founder.



Benefits & Perks

Generous Time Off: 14 days of paid leave + unlimited unpaid time off.



Financial Growth: End-of-year performance bonus.



Career Path: This isn't just a gig—we are looking for someone to grow into a Head Video Editor position.



Mentorship: Learn the ins and outs of the DTC skincare industry directly from the founder.



[IMPORTANT] We will only review applications from candidates who apply with 10 Apply Points (AP).



Please include:



A link to your portfolio or previous work (specifically CapCut/Short-form content).



A brief intro on why you’re the best fit for our skincare brand.

title: Content and Marketing Manager
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



We're seeking a creative and detail-oriented Content and Marketing Manager to help grow our creative business. You'll work with a published author who has books on Amazon and is expanding into social media, marketing, and content creation. The author also has a e-commerce store for various kinds of merch and apparel.  



WHAT WE OFFER

title: LinkedIn Content Manager & Strategist (HNWI & Finance Niche)
description:
LinkedIn Content Manager & Strategist (HNWI & Finance Niche)







About Us:



We are a premium marketing agency specializing in HNWI acquisition for fund managers and family offices. Our founder has a 35,000+ follower platform. We are looking for a right-hand marketing manager to turn our industry insights into a high-authority media machine.







The Mission:



You won’t just be "posting." You will be managing the digital reputation of a thought leader in the private equity and wealth management space.







Scope of Work:







• Content Extraction: Transforming founder voice notes/briefs into 5-7 high-authority LinkedIn posts per week.







• Visual Storytelling: Creating "clean, minimalist" carousels and data-driven visuals (Not flashy/generic).







• The "Surround Sound" Strategy: 20x daily strategic comments on "Whale" accounts (Fund Managers/LPs) to drive profile views.







• The Lead Magnet: Compiling 1x weekly "Investor Intelligence Report" for giveaway campaigns.







• Institutional Presence: 1x weekly "Trust-building" update on our Company Page.







What we are looking for:







• Sophisticated Writing: You hate "AI-sounding" fluff. You write with brevity and punch.







• Financial Literacy: You understand the difference between an LP and a GP, and you know what AU
ans.







• Consistency: You are obsessed with the "Daily" streak.







Growth hacking: ability to create strong hooks so that posts go viral, and strategies to increase followers.







Compensation: $500 / month.







Questions 



Since you are specialing in finance, ask these "Filter Questions" to see if they actually know the industry:







1. "Give me a 2-sentence 'hook' for a post about why Family Offices are moving away from traditional hedge funds." (Tests writing + finance knowledge).







3. "How do you handle negative or 'troll' comments on a high-authority post?"







Will you leverage artificial intelligence? Is so.. how, and which tools?







What are your top 3 biggest achievements in LinkedIn marketing?







What is your experience, specifically with Investment Finance?

title: HIRING: Experienced Airbnb / STR Operations Specialist
description:
Full-Time | Long-Term | Remote



Hi! - We are hiring an experienced Airbnb / STR Operations Specialist for our growing short-term rental company based in Las Vegas.



This is NOT an entry-level VA role.



We are looking for someone who already has real, recent hands-on experience in Airbnb / STR operations and can step in quickly with minimal hand-holding.



We will teach you our SOPs, standards, workflows, and how we like things done — but you should already know about 90% of the job.



WHAT YOU’LL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR:



* Airbnb guest communication

* Guest issue handling and customer service

* Post-checkout calls

* Difficult guest situations

* Refund requests and review protection

* Vendor coordination

* Work orders and operations follow-up

* Taking over teammates’ shifts on their days off

* Pushing open issues to final completion

* Using slow periods wisely to follow up, clean up loose ends, and reduce future problems



WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:



* Strong recent STR / Airbnb experience

* Comfortable using Airbnb, Guesty, Slack, Gmail, and Google Sheets/Docs

* Strong written and spoken English

* Calm under pressure

* Professional with guests and vendors

* Proactive and self-managed

* Strong follow-through

* Organized and detail-oriented

* Urgent and responsive

* Able to think independently instead of waiting to be told every next step



YOU MAY BE A GREAT FIT IF YOU NATURALLY THINK LIKE THIS:



* What can I finalize today?

* What still needs follow-up?

* Who do I need to call?

* What is still unresolved?

* What can I clean up while it’s quiet?

* What can I do now to reduce tomorrow’s problems?



DO NOT APPLY IF:



* You do not have real Airbnb / STR experience

* You are currently working another client during this shift

* You still need basic training before becoming useful

* You wait for instructions instead of taking ownership

* You get overwhelmed easily

* You avoid difficult conversations with guests or vendors

* You are weak on follow-up, urgency, or closure



SCHEDULE

Philippines Time



* Monday: 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM

* Tuesday: OFF

* Wednesday: 11:00 PM – 9:00 AM

* Thursday: 11:00 PM – 9:00 AM

* Friday: OFF

* Saturday: 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM

* Sunday: OFF



Please apply only if you can commit to this exact schedule consistently.



PAY:



* $5/hour

* Opportunity for increased pay over time based on performance, reliability, ownership, and growth



WHY THIS ROLE IS A GREAT OPPORTUNITY:

This is not just a task-based VA job.



This is a long-term opportunity to become an important part of a growing Airbnb / STR operation. We are looking for someone reliable, experienced, and proactive who wants to grow with the company and become truly valuable over time.



HOW TO APPLY? 

* Please complete our questionnaire here: 

* Only candidates who complete the questionnaire and follow instructions carefully will be considered.

title: REMOTE PARALEGAL/LEGAL ASSISTANT
description:
Legal Document Preparation & Filing



Draft, review, and finalize legal documents including complaints, petitions, motions, declarations, and responses across all practice areas

Prepare California Judicial Council forms (e.g., FL-311, UD-100, SUM-100, POS-010, FW-001) using correct annotation/overlay methods

Format pleadings using California pleading paper standards (28-line numbered format, Courier New caption, Times New Roman body, proper margins)

Prepare Proofs of Service (POS-010) for each defendant served, ensuring all items are correctly completed

Organize and assemble documents for e-filing and physical filing with California Superior Courts

Manage client "To eFile" folders and ensure documents are court-ready before submission



Case & Client Management



Maintain organized digital case files for each client within the firm's folder structure (organized by practice area and client name)

Track case deadlines, court dates, hearing schedules, and filing due dates

Communicate with clients via
 and phone to gather information, provide updates, and answer procedural questions

Manage client intake for new matters, including initial document collection and file setup

Coordinate with process servers and track service of process across defendants



Legal Research & Analysis



Conduct California legal research using FindLaw, Sacramento County Law Library resources, Westlaw, or similar platforms

Research relevant California statutes, case law, and court rules to support motions and briefs

Review and summarize case law and statutory authorities for use in legal memoranda and court filings

Monitor changes in California court rules and local rules for courts where cases are filed



Court Procedures & Compliance



Ensure all filings comply with California Rules of Court and applicable local rules

Prepare fee waiver applications (FW-001) and supporting documentation when applicable

Calendar and track statutory deadlines (e.g., response times, discovery cutoffs, trial dates)

Coordinate e-filing submissions through California court e-filing portals



Administrative & Operations Support



Maintain the firm's legal library (forms, books, guides) organized by practice area

Assist with billing, invoicing, and time tracking for client matters

Support business development by preparing marketing materials, client-facing documents, and intake workflows

Manage correspondence and follow up on outstanding items across all active cases





Practice Areas You Will Support



Family Law: Custody, visitation, support, dissolution, ex parte applications

Unlawful Detainer: Eviction complaints, responses, motions, trial preparation

Civil Litigation: General complaints, cross-complaints, discovery, motions, trial prep

Wills & Trusts: Will drafting, trust preparation, estate planning documents

Bankruptcy: Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 petition preparation and schedules

Consumer Protection: Demand letters, complaints, statutory claims

Employment Law: Wage claims, discrimination complaints, demand letters

Real Estate: Purchase agreements, dispute resolution, landlord-tenant issues

Qualifications

Required:



Paralegal certificate, legal assistant diploma, or equivalent legal education (law degree from any jurisdiction is a plus)

Minimum 2 years of experience in a paralegal, legal assistant, or legal document preparation role

Working knowledge of U.S. legal systems, particularly California state court procedures

Professional-level English proficiency (written and verbal) — you will draft legal documents and communicate with U.S. clients

Strong attention to detail with the ability to produce error-free legal documents

Excellent organizational and time-management skills; ability to manage multiple cases simultaneously

Proficiency with document management, cloud storage, and digital filing systems

Reliable high-speed internet connection and a dedicated, professional workspace

Availability to work during U.S. Pacific Time business hours (at least partial overlap)



Preferred:



Experience with California Judicial Council forms and e-filing systems

Familiarity with California Rules of Court and local court rules (especially Los Angeles and Orange County)

Prior remote work experience with a U.S.-based law firm or legal services company

Bilingual in English and Spanish or Filipino/Tagalog (a significant asset for client communication)

Experience with legal research databases (FindLaw, Westlaw, LexisNexis)

Knowledge of California family law, unlawful detainer, or civil litigation procedures





Software & Tools

You will be expected to work with the following platforms and tools (training provided where needed):

Document Preparation & Editing



Microsoft Word / LibreOffice Writer — drafting pleadings, motions, and legal documents

Adobe Acrobat / PDF editing tools — form annotation, PDF assembly, and court-ready formatting

Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive) — collaboration, spreadsheets, and cloud storage



Case & Practice Management



Clio / MyCase / PracticePanther (or similar) — case management, calendaring, and time tracking

Google Calendar — deadline tracking and scheduling

Cloud-based file management systems — organized by practice area and client



Legal Research & Filing



FindLaw / Westlaw / LexisNexis — case law and statutory research

California Courts e-filing portals — electronic court filings

PACER (Federal) — federal case lookup and document retrieval



Communication & Productivity



Gmail / Google Workspace — primary
 and client communication

Zoom / Google Meet — virtual meetings with clients and team

Slack / Microsoft Teams — internal team communication

AI-assisted tools (Claude, ChatGPT) — legal research augmentation and document drafting support





Compensation & Benefits



Salary: Competitive and commensurate with experience (paid in USD)

Schedule: Flexible working hours with required overlap during U.S. Pacific Time business hours

Growth: Opportunity to grow into a senior paralegal or operations management role as the firm expands

Training: Ongoing training on California court procedures, legal technology, and practice-area-specific knowledge

Environment: Fully remote position with a collaborative, supportive team culture





How to Apply

Interested candidates should submit the following:



Updated resume or CV highlighting relevant legal experience

Cover letter explaining your interest in the role and your experience with U.S. legal document preparation

Writing sample (a legal document you have prepared, with confidential information redacted)

References from previous legal employers or clients (optional but encouraged)





Clause and Effect is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and are committed to building a diverse, inclusive team.

s

title: YouTube and Viral Shorts Video Editor
description:
My name is Melanie Guintu, and I’m a travel vlogger focused on sharing authentic, real-life experiences around the world.



I’m currently looking for a video editor to help with:

• Long-form YouTube videos

• Short-form content (YouTube Shorts, TikTok, Reels)



My editing style is not overly flashy. I value:

• Strong storytelling

• Clean, intentional cuts

• Emotional connection

• Relatable, real 
nts



The goal is to create engaging, binge-worthy content that keeps viewers watching and performs well on YouTube. I’m also looking for someone who can clip long-form videos into viral Shorts and Reels.



Typical weekly output:

• 2 YouTube videos (~1 hour each)

• 5
 videos (3–5 minutes each)

• 10 Shorts/Reels (30–60 seconds each)



My travel vlogs are filmed in a more raw live stream style, so the editing focus is less on heavy effects and more on:

• Cutting out slower or unnecessary 
nts

• Maintaining strong pacing and flow

• Shaping the footage into a clear, engaging storyline



I’m looking for someone who:

• Understands YouTube pacing, retention, and viewer psychology

• Can structure footage into a compelling story (not just basic edits)

• Knows how to hook viewers in the first few seconds and maintain attention throughout

• Can add captions, music, and occasional effects/sound design to enhance engagement (without overdoing it)



Bonus if you:

• Have experience editing travel or vlog-style content

• Understand viral content and short-form clipping



I’d like to start with a small test project, and if it’s a good fit, continue working together long-term.



If you’re interested, please send:

 1. Examples of your work (especially YouTube content)

 2. Your rate per video or per hour

 3. Your turnaround time



Start your message with “sunshine” so I know you read this.



Looking forward to working together!

Best,

Melanie Guintu ????



YouTube: youtube.co
lanieguintu

Instagram: instagram.co
lanieguintu

:
.co
lanieguintu

title: Video Editor — YouTube Finance Channel
description:
About the Role

I run a YouTube channel focused on AI and finance (50 videos, growing fast). I need a video editor to take over the editing and publishing workflow so I can focus on recording and scripting.



This is a long-term, part-time role, with potential for full-time ~6 months out. You'll edit 4-6 videos per week, each 4-12 minutes long. The style is locked in — I'll give you example videos, CapCut project files with my preferred settings, and access to my Canva account for thumbnails.



Your normal working hours (Philippine time, 8am-5pm) are perfect. I record during my morning in the US (CST), drop raw footage in a shared Google Drive folder, and you edit during your daytime. Your 5pm is my 4am — I wake up to finished cuts ready to review.



What You'll Do



Edit raw screen recordings + face cam footage in CapCut

Follow established editing style (cuts, zooms, text overlays, transitions — all demonstrated in example files)

Create thumbnails using existing Canva templates

Add titles, descriptions, tags, and timestamps (I'll provide a template)

Light audio cleanup (noise reduction, level balancing — nothing complex)

Turnaround: 24 hours from raw footage drop to finished edit in the Drive folder



What I'll Provide



10+ example videos showing the exact editing style

CapCut project files with my settings, fonts, and color scheme

Canva account access with thumbnail templates

Google Drive folder structure for file handoff

Video description template with standard CTA, links, and formatting

Slack or
 for 
 communication



Requirements



Strong CapCut editing skills (this is non-negotiable — we don't use Premiere or Final Cut)

Experience editing YouTube tutorial/educational content

Reliable internet and ability to handle large video files

Can start within 1 week

Available 20-25 hours/week



Nice to Have (not required)



Familiarity with finance/business content

Experience with Canva for thumbnail design

Basic understanding of YouTube SEO (titles, tags, descriptions)

Experience cutting long-form content into YouTube Shorts/TikTok/Reels



Compensation

$
/month USD depending on experience, paid biweekly via Wise or PayPal. This is a long-term role with room to grow as the channel scales.

Growth path: Phase 1 is long-form video editing. Within 30 days, we'll add cutting long-form videos into YouTube Shorts (vertical, 30-60 seconds). More scope = higher pay.

How to Apply

Send me:



A link to 2-3 YouTube videos you've edited (educational/tutorial style preferred)

A short Loom video (under 2 minutes) showing how you'd approach editing a screen recording tutorial

Your CapCut experience level and how many videos you typically edit per week



I'll send a paid test edit ($25) to my top 3 candidates using actual raw footage from my channel.

title: Video Editor for E-Commerce Ads (UGC / Performance Marketing)
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce brand based in Sweden, focused on performance marketing and scaling through high-quality ad creatives.



We are now looking for a high-level video editor who can help us produce UGC-style ads, performance creatives, and iterations based on data.



This is NOT just basic editing.

We are building a creative system — and you will be a key part of it.



---



What You Will Do

 • Edit short-form video ads (TikTok / Meta / Reels)

 • Work from structured briefs (script, hooks, angles)

 • Create 3 variations per concept

 • Iterate on winning ads based on performance data

 • Add subtitles, pacing, hooks, and visual elements to improve retention

 • Turn raw footage + voiceovers into high-converting ads



---



What We Expect From You

 • Strong skills in Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve

 • Experience editing UGC ads or performance marketing creatives

 • Good understanding of:

 • Hooks (first 1–3 seconds)

 • Pacing

 • Retention

 • Ability to work independently without micromanagement

 • Someone who takes initiative and improves things without being told

 • Fast, reliable, and consistent



---



IMPORTANT – THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU IF:

 • You want to grow long-term with a brand

 • You are hungry to improve and get better every week

 • You enjoy creative work AND performance-based thinking



---



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF:

 • You need step-by-step instructions for everything

 • You only do “basic editing”

 • You are slow or inconsistent



---



Trial Task (IMPORTANT)



To apply, you will receive:

 • Raw video clips

 • Voiceover

 • Script



Your job:

Create ONE finished ad



You will NOT get detailed instructions.

We want to see how you think, structure, and execute.



---



Work Schedule

 • Flexible

 • Expected output: 2–5 videos per day depending on workload

 • Long-term opportunity for full-time work



---



Salary

 • $600/month (starting)

 • Performance-based increases over time



---



Future Opportunities



You will grow into a key role in our creative team, including:

 • Creative strategy input

 • Scaling winning ads

 • Testing new concepts

 • Potential leadership role



---



How to Apply



Please include:

 1. Short introduction about yourself

 2. Your experience with video editing

 3. Examples of ads you’ve created (VERY IMPORTANT)

 4. What software you use

 5. Why you want to work with us

This role is focused primarily on cold calling landowners, identifying selling opportunities, and qualifying motivated sellers to keep our acquisition pipeline strong. If you’re competitive, organized, and enjoy conversations that lead to deals, this role could be a strong fit.

, or DM about this role
