title: Travel Funnel & Facebook Ads Specialist (Group Travel – High Performance Role)
description:
We are seeking an experienced Funnel Builder +
 Ads Specialist to help us fill a 15–20 traveler luxury South Africa group (June 2026).

This is NOT a basic virtual assistant role.

We are looking for someone who can generate PAID bookings, not just leads.



Project Goal

Fill 15–20 travelers

Timeline: 60 days (30-day accelerated bonus available)

Focus on converting leads into paid clients



Responsibilities

Build a high-converting landing page in Go High Level

Integrate Stripe payment links (service fee required before booking)

Launch and manage
 & Instagram ad campaigns

Generate qualified leads and convert them into paid bookings

Optimize campaigns daily for performance

Track and report daily/weekly results (leads, bookings, cost per conversion)



 Communication & Follow-Up (REQUIRED)

Daily follow-up with all leads is REQUIRED

All new leads must be contacted within a few hours

Follow-ups must continue until conversion or disqualification

Provide daily updates on:

Leads generated

Follow-ups completed

Paid bookings



 Ad Account & Transparency Requirements

You must run ads using your own
 ad account

You must provide access to view campaign performance (Ads Manager or shared reporting)

Full transparency on ad spend and results is REQUIRED

Must be comfortable managing and scaling ad budgets



Compensation

$4–$6/hour (base)

Performance Bonus:

$500 bonus for filling 20 paid bookings within 60 days

$1,000 bonus if 20 bookings are filled within 30 days

Additional bonuses and long-term opportunities available for future group projects.



Requirements (MUST HAVE)

Proven experience running
 Ads with results

Experience building funnels (Go High Level preferred)

Strong understanding of conversion optimization

Fast communication (responses within hours, not once per day)



Experience generating SALES (not just leads)

 To Apply, Answer:

How many PAID bookings have you generated for a project before?

What is your average cost per lead and cost per conversion?

What ad budget would you require to fill 15–20 travelers?

Can you build funnels inside Go High Level?

Can you run ads on your own account and provide access?



Bonus (Preferred)

Experience in travel or luxury travel

Experience selling group travel

Experience with Stripe integrations



We are looking for a long-term partner. If you perform well, you will manage multiple group launches with us.

title: Collections Manager
description:
WFH

Graveyard Shift

1 year contract



Position Overview



Job Description

The Collections Manager is responsible for overseeing the accounts receivable collections process to ensure timely payment of invoices and maintain healthy cash flow. This role manages the collections team, monitors aging reports, resolves payment issues with clients, and works closely with accounting, billing, and operations teams to reduce outstanding receivables.



The Collections Manager will implement structured follow-up procedures, monitor collection performance metrics, and ensure accurate documentation of all collection activities.



Key Responsibilities:

Accounts Receivable & Collections Management

- Manage the full accounts receivable collections process for all client accounts.

-Monitor AR aging reports and identify overdue balances.

- Ensure consistent follow-up on past due invoices through
, phone calls, and formal notices.

- Prioritize high-value and high-risk accounts to reduce outstanding balances.

-  Work with clients to resolve billing disputes and payment issues.

- Negotiate payment plans when necessary.



Team Leadership

- Manage and supervise the collections team.

- Assign accounts and collection priorities.

- Train tea
mbers on collection procedures and systems.

- Monitor team performance and ensure collection targets are met.



Reporting & Analysis

- Produce weekly and monthly collections reports.

- Track KPIs such as:

          Days Sales Outstanding (DSO)

          Collection rate

          Aging trends

         Top delinquent accounts

- Present reports and updates to senior management.



Cross-Department Coordination

- Work closely with:

       Finance & Accounting

      Billing

      Sales

     Operations



- Ensure invoices are accurate and disputes are resolved quickly.

- Coordinate with accounting to apply payments correctly in QuickBooks.



Process Improvement

- Develop and implement improved collections procedures.

- Identify inefficiencies in billing or invoicing processes that delay payments.

- Implement automation and reporting tools where appropriate.



Compliance & Documentation

- Ensure all collection activity is properly documented.

- Maintain accurate client communication records.

- Ensure collection practices comply with company policies and applicable laws.



Qualifications

Experience

- 5+ years of experience in accounts receivable or collections.

- 2+ years managing a collections team preferred.

- Experience with large commercial accounts and high invoice volumes.



Technical Skills

- Experience with QuickBooks or similar accounting software.

- Strong knowledge of AR aging and collections strategies.

- Proficiency with Excel and financial reporting tools.



Soft Skills

- Strong negotiation and communication skills.

- High attention to detail.

- Ability to manage multiple priorities.

- Strong problem-solving and conflict resolution skills.



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

- The Collections Manager will be evaluated based on:

- Reduction in Days Sales Outstanding (DSO)

- Monthly collections percentage

- Reduction of 90+ day receivables

- Resolution time for billing disputes

- Accuracy of AR reporting

- Team productivity and performance



Send your resume to

title: AI Video Generator & Animator (VEO 3.1 Professional)
description:
We are an aggressively growing eCommerce and Retail brand looking for a highly skilled AI Video Generator Professional to join our creative team full-time. 



Your primary focus will be leveraging advanced AI video generation tools—specifically VEO 3.1—to create high-converting, hyper-realistic, and visually stunning video content for our marketing campaigns, Amazon A+ Premium Content, TikTok Shop, and Meta ads.



Responsibilities:



- Generate, edit, and refine high-quality AI video content using VEO 3.1 and other cutting-edge AI video tools.

- Turn static images, text prompts, and existing brand assets into dynamic, engaging video ads.

- Iterate rapidly on video creatives based on performance feedback from our Paid Media Buyers.

- Maintain a consistent brand aesthetic and high production value across all generated content.

- Stay up-to-date with the latest advancements in AI video generation, prompt engineering, and digital marketing trends.



Requirements:



- Proven experience and high proficiency with Google VEO (specifically VEO 3.1) or similar top-tier AI video generators (Sora, Runway Gen-3, Midjourney to Video workflows, etc.).

- Strong understanding of prompt engineering for accurate and consistent video generation.

- Solid foundation in video editing software (Premiere Pro, CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, or After Effects) to stitch, color-correct, and finalize AI-generated clips.

- A strong portfolio demonstrating your previous AI video generation and animation work.

- Excellent English communication skills and the ability to collaborate with a fast-paced remote team.



What We Offer:



- Full-time, long-term position in a stable and growing eCommerce business.

- Work-from-home flexibility.

- Room for creative freedom and testing the latest AI tools on the market.



How to Apply:

Please submit your application with a link to your portfolio specifically highlighting videos you have generated using VEO 3.1 or similar advanced AI video models. Applications without a relevant AI video portfolio will not be considered.

This is very simple: install the app from the Google Play Store, keep it running, and follow short testing/verification steps when requested.

- Install the app (Google Play Store)

- Keep it running in the background

- Phone stays connected to the internet (20-24h/day)

- Occasionally complete short check-in/testing steps (to confirm stability + uptime)



Why it’s a good fit:

- No calls, no meetings

- Works alongside any VA/freelance job

- Setup once ? keep running long-term

- Great for anyone who wants a low-effort side gig



Requirements:

:

title: Sales Team Lead - Remote Tech Startup (Performance Bonuses + Growth Path)
description:
We run a high-growth online platform that converts web traffic into paying customers using a mix of live sales reps and AI-assisted workflows. We're doing six figures monthly and scaling fast. We need a Sales Operations Manager to own the entire live sales function - the team, the systems, the numbers. You'll report directly to the founder.



You'll manage a team of sales reps who handle live customer conversations. Your job is to make them better, make the operation bigger, and make the numbers go up. Specifically:

- Hire, train, schedule, and hold reps accountable

- Own the full conversation-to-conversion funnel - first message to paid customer

- Analyze conversation logs, build scripts and playbooks, and push conversion rates up week over week

- Scale the team as traffic grows without letting conversion quality drop

- Track and report key metrics: conversion rate, revenue per rep, response times, conversations handled

- Build SOPs and training materials so new hires ramp fast

- Coordinate with the ads team on traffic volume, audience quality, and timing



You:

- 2+ years managing a sales or customer-facing team (not just individual contributor experience)

- You think in conversion rates, not vibes - decisions backed by data

- Strong written English

- You build systems and enforce them

- Comfortable with remote async tools

- Available for set working hours - this is a real full-time role, not freelance



Big Plus

- Experience with AI-assisted sales workflows or hybrid human/AI operations

- Track record of measurably improving conversion rates

- Experience managing remote teams across time zones



Compensation

- ?78,500/mo starting base (~$1,300 USD), adjusted for experience

- Performance bonuses tied to conversion targets and revenue milestones

- Direct access to the founder - your input shapes company strategy

- Clear growth path - as the operation scales, so does your role and comp



To Apply

Send a message with: who you are, your relevant experience, the largest team you've managed, and your resume.

title: Paid Ads Specialist – Meta & Google PPC (Home Service Niche)
description:
Remote | Digital Marketing for Home Service Professionals 

FULL TIME - 40 hours a week



About Us:

At Savclicks, we specialize in helping contractors and home service professionals dominate their local markets through performance-driven digital marketing. We work with proven offers in the home service space and focus on predictable lead generation using paid ads, strong funnels, and solid follow-up systems.

We’re growing and looking for a Paid Ads Specialist who knows how to generate results with Meta Ads, Google PPC, and GoHighLevel, specifically for home service businesses. If you’ve managed real ad spend, produced real leads, and have results to prove it — we want to talk.



What You’ll Do:

Set up, launch, and manage Meta 
/Instagram) and Google Ads campaigns for home service clients.

Handle ad account onboarding (Meta Business Manager, Google Ads, conversion tracking, pixels, events, etc.)

Optimize campaigns regularly to improve CPL, lead quality, and consistency

Connect and manage ad integrations inside GoHighLevel (forms, pipelines, triggers, lead routing, automations)

Monitor budgets, pacing, and performance to avoid overspending or lead drops

Troubleshoot tracking, lead flow, and delivery issues proactively

Produce clear, simple reporting (weekly snapshots + monthly summaries)

Collaborate with the team to ensure ads align with offers, landing pages, and follow-up systems



Qualifications:

3+ years of hands-on paid ads experience (Meta Ads & Google PPC required)

Proven experience in the home service / contractor niche (roofing, HVAC, screens, moving, renovations, etc.)

Proof of results required (case studies, screenshots, dashboards, CPL benchmarks, or client references)

Strong understanding of lead generation funnels and local service advertising

GoHighLevel experience required (sub-accounts, integrations, pipelines, basic automations)

Comfortable managing multiple accounts and budgets simultaneously

Detail-oriented, organized, and proactive — you don’t wait for things to break

Autonomous and accountable — you own your numbers and your performance

Experience onboarding new clients

Relatable, driven person

Experience working in an agency environment considered a plus



Bonus:

Experience with Google Local Services Ads (LSAs)

Experience improving lead quality, not just volume

Agency or multi-client account experience



Who This Role Is For:

This role is not for beginners or “boosted post” marketers.

We’re looking for someone who understands:

Local service lead generation

Performance metrics that actually matter (CPL, booked calls, lead quality)

How ads connect to CRMs, follow-ups, and real-world sales

You’ll have flexibility and autonomy, but you’ll also be expected to deliver results and communicate clearly.



Compensation:

Monthly retainer / salary (based on experience)

Full time Role 40 hours per week



Location:

This is a remote-first position. You can work from anywhere as long as you’re responsive, professional, and consistently delivering results.



Ready to Join Us?



At Savclicks, we speak the language of contractors and home service pros and we build systems that actually drive leads, not vanity metrics. If you’re a proven paid ads specialist who wants to work with a focused niche and a growing agency, we want to hear from you.

title: Create Instagram Ads: Story + Posts

title: Webdeveloper with eye for modern design who understands Dutch language
description:
We're looking for a WordPress web developer who speaks Dutch.



Hi! I'm Mieke, founder of Hummingbirds — a digital marketing and web development agency based in Belgium. We build websites for a wide range of clients, and all of our projects are in Dutch. That's why understanding the Dutch language is an absolute must for this role.



What we're looking for



We're on the lookout for a talented web developer who ticks the following boxes:



- You understand Dutch — not just technically, but enough to read, interpret and work with Dutch content, copy and client briefs

- You have solid experience with WordPress and are comfortable working with other CMS platforms as well

- You have a genuine eye for design — this is just as important as the technical side. We want someone who cares about how a website looks and feels, not just how it works

What the work looks like

Looking forward to hearing from you!



Mieke De Weerdt

title: Female Appointment Setter

The Role

Your Responsibilities

title: Remote Sales Development Rep
description:
Full-Time Remote Sales Rep

Job Description:

Evolving Document of Agreed Upon Expectations



Full time outbound SDR who finds their own leads, does 100+ outbound touches / day, and closes first orders via our order form, escalating larger accounts to manager and after 90 days of ramp, consistently opens 8–12+ new accounts per month.

Requirements

C1+ English, comfortable on the phone with US business owners.

Stable high?speed internet, headset, quiet workspace.

Prior outbound calling / sales experience.

Comfortable working US CST hours

Expectations

Time Zone: USA CST

You’ll work 8–9 hours/day within the 8am–8pm CST window, 5–6 days/week (50 hrs total).



We measure based on inputs, results, and behaviors. Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) that you need to hit are outlined below. 



Ramp Up Period:

30 Day Expectations – 2-4 new accounts per month

60 Day – 4-6 new accounts per month

90 Days – you should be closing 8-12+ new accounts monthly consistently

Activity Metrics (Inputs)

Hours: Minimum 50 working hours per week.

Primary Actions: 100+ primary actions per day (calls, texts,
s to decision makers at smoke shops). 

Mix: At least 40% of actions = new outreach (not just follow?ups).

200 New Leads added to Pipeline Weekly. New leads = new smoke shops added to CRM with owner contact info. (If a shop has more than one location, it is counted as one account)

Logging in CRM: Every action is logged in the tracker (no log = didn’t happen), including time, type, and outcome. 

Primary actions = any meaningful outbound touch that can move a deal forward.

Consequences: This is the scorecard. If you hit these numbers and live these behaviors, we’re good. If not, we’ll have one correction conversation. If it still doesn’t change, I’ll let you go. That’s not personal; that’s the agreement.

Results Metrics (Outputs)

Weekly

Inputs: 600 Primary Actions

Pipeline:

80–100 smoke shops reached (who at least know your name/company name).

40–60 engaged shops (they replied, took a call, or requested info).

15–20 in “hot” status (clear intent to order / waiting on something small).

New Accounts:

1–2 new accounts closed

Clear path to 2-4+ new accounts in next 2-4 weeks from the existing pipeline.

Behavior Standards

Communicate

Reply to your manager within 20min on all work messages.

Be on time for all scheduled check?ins / roleplays.

If you’re going to miss a metric or a day, you tell me before, not after.

Be Accountable

Accurately log all leads and actions same day.

Own mistakes and bring problems with a proposed solution.

Falsifying activity or results is immediate termination.

Be Coachable

Attend weekly check-ins, roleplay, or training.

Implement feedback on scripts and process quickly.

Protect the Brand

Be respectful and professional with every shop.

Follow all compliance / legal guidelines for outreach.



Consequences: One major breach of trust (lying about activity, disrespecting customers, ghosting) is grounds for immediate termination.



Weekly Reports:

Link is on CRM - Filled out by 5 PM CST every Sunday. 



Note: These are the rules of the game. If you hit the actions and live the behaviors, I’ll back you and invest in you. If you don’t, we agreed up front that I’ll end the role quickly.





Compensation

Base salary: $400 USD per month.

Commission: 10% of the first sale of any New Account you close in a given month (excluding shipping and other pass-through operational costs).

Base salary is contingent on meeting activity requirements. If you consistently miss activity targets, we will end the role.

Commissions are paid on all qualifying New Accounts you close while employed.

New Account = a business that has never ordered from us before (new legal entity).



Next Steps – Application

Step 1 – Written Task (REQUIRED)



Please answer ALL of the questions below in writing and paste your answers into your application:



Confirm Requirements

Are you able to work US CST hours (night shift in your country)?

Do you have C1 or better English and prior outbound calling experience?

What city/country are you in and what is your internet speed (upload/download)?



Cold Outreach Sample (5–8 sentences)

Imagine you are calling a smoke shop owner for the first time. Write what you would say from “Hello” until you ask them to place a small first test order.

Include:

A quick intro (who you are, company name)

Why you’re calling

One clear benefit for ordering from us

A simple call?to?action (next step)



Past Volume & Results

Briefly describe your most recent outbound role:

What was your daily target for calls / messages?

What was your best month (results you achieved)?



Handling the Hard Days (3–5 sentences)

On days you don’t feel like making calls but still must hit 100+ actions, what do you do to push through and hit your numbers?



Step 2 – Voice Test (2–3 minutes total)



Please record a 2–3 minute audio or video (Loom, Vocaroo, unlisted YouTube, etc.) and send the link in your reply. One take is fine. Use English only.



Part 1 (about 60 seconds): Introduce Yourself



Your name, location, and past outbound sales experience.

The most dials / messages you’ve done in a single day.

Why you want a high?volume cold calling role working US CST hours.



Part 2 (about 60–90 seconds): Mock Call



Pretend you’re calling “Joe’s Smoke Shop” for the first time.

Do a real opening like it’s a live call (no reading monotone).

Goal: get Joe interested in placing a small test order or speaking to your manager.

Handle this objection once: “We already have a distributor.”

Record in a quiet place with a stable connection so I can clearly hear your voice, pace, and energy.

title: Sales Development Executive
description:
About CareAutomate



CareAutomate is a Medicaid billing and operations automation platform built for Home and Community Based Services (HCBS) providers across the United States. We help agencies eliminate claim rejections, automate EVV compliance, and get paid faster — without the manual chaos that comes with Medicaid billing. Our buyers are Executive Directors, Billing Managers, and Program Directors at HCBS agencies navigating complex state Medicaid programs. We operate across multiple US states and are expanding rapidly.



About the Role



We are hiring a seasoned, full-time Sales Development Representative based in the Philippines to own the top of our sales funnel. You will cold call,
, engage US-based HCBS agency decision-makers, schedule, complete the demo and close the sale. This is not an entry-level role. We need someone who can run a sharp, professional outreach conversation, book & complete qualified demos consistently.



What You Will Do



Make 60–80 outbound cold calls per day to HCBS agency decision-makers across the US 

Execute multi-touch
 cadences via Smartlead targeting Executive Directors and Billing Managers

Qualify prospects through discovery conversations, book and perform software demos

Handle objections with education-led rebuttals

Log all activity accurately in HubSpot CRM daily: calls,
s, outcomes, and next steps

Research target agencies on prospecting softwares before outreach to personalize messaging by state and program

Meet or exceed weekly KPIs: dials, connects, qualified conversations, and demos booked



What We Need From You



Non-Negotiable Requirements

3–4+ years of B2B SDR or inside sales experience

Selling software or SaaS products to US clients

Native or near-native English fluency — spoken and written

Proven cold calling track record with measurable metrics to show

Availability during US business hours (EST / CST / PST)

Reliable internet and a quiet, professional calling environment



Strong Advantage

HubSpot CRM experience — required for daily activity logging


 or Smartlead experience

Selling into healthcare, compliance, or government-funded software

Familiarity with Medicaid, HCBS, or the home health sector

Prior BPO or offshore US sales experience

Ability to write cold
 sequences from scratch

Background in quota-carrying SDR roles



Communication Standard



We require US-standard spoken English. You will be calling Executive Directors and Billing Managers at healthcare agencies — people who will disengage the 
nt they sense a scripted or low-quality call. Your tone must be warm, confident, and conversational. You must be able to run a live discovery, pivot naturally when a prospect pushes back, and close for the next step without reading off a sheet.



Compensation & Structure



Base Pay: Competitive and negotiable based on experience

Commission: Per qualified demo booked and per closed deal

Hours: Full-time, aligned to US business hours (EST/CST/PST)

Contract Type: Full-time remote contractor

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
We’re looking for a highly organized and proactive Virtual Assistant who can provide day-to-day support across admin, client management, content, and personal tasks. This role is ideal for someone detail-oriented, tech-savvy, and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment with shifting time zones (South America & Europe).



1. Responsibilities



A. Administrative Support



- Manage
s, respond to inquiries, and categorize messages for priority responses.

- Schedule meetings, appointments, and manage calendars.

- Organize digital files, documents, and CRM records.

- Maintain task lists and send reminders for important deadlines.

- Assist in processing invoices and managing basic financial documentation.



B. Client & Sales Support



- Respond to client inquiries via
, social media, and chat.

- Follow up with prospects and leads based on predefined workflows.

- Update CRM and sales tracking systems with new leads and deal statuses.

- Assist in onboarding new clients (sending contracts, welcome
s, intake forms).



C. Social Media & Content Support

- Assist in posting content for Instagram,
, LinkedIn, and YouTube.

- Edit and repurpose video content for YouTube, Instagram Reels, and other short-form platforms (cutting clips, adding subtitles, and optimizing for engagement).



D. Recruitment & HR Support

- Post job openings on recruitment platforms and screen applications.

- Schedule interviews and coordinate with potential hires.

- Maintain a pipeline of talented sales closers and other key hires.



E. Personal Life Task Management



- Schedule personal appointments (doctor, dentist, fitness, travel, etc.).

- Book reservations (restaurants, hotels, flights, car rentals, etc.).

- Online shopping, gift ordering, and personal errands (as needed).

- Research and book personal development programs, events, or networking opportunities.

- Remind and manage key dates (birthdays, anniversaries, special occasions).

- Coordinate travel logistics, itinerary planning, and necessary documentation.

- Assist in managing personal finance tasks (paying bills, setting reminders, tracking expenses).





Be willing to work flexible hours based on my adjusting time zone throughout South America and Europe. Willing to work 6 days per days per week.



To apply, please send:



1. Your CV

2. Portfolio (if available)

3. Loom video showing the same experience related to the job

title: B2B Sales Closer / Appointment Setter — Must Close Deals
description:
B2B Sales Closer / Appointment Setter — Must Close Deals





We are hiring a remote B2B sales professional who can do more than lead generation.



We need someone who can:

 • prospect and start conversations

 • qualify leads

 • handle objections

 • follow up consistently

 • book meetings when needed

 • and most importantly, help convert qualified prospects into signed deals



This role is not only appointment setting.

We want someone who understands the full sales process and is confident moving prospects toward a real close.



Main Responsibilities

 • outbound prospecting by phone,
, and SMS when needed

 • qualify leads and identify buying intent

 • manage follow-up without dropping leads

 • handle objections professionally

 • move prospects toward commitment

 • close deals when appropriate

 • update CRM/pipeline accurately

 • help improve scripts and conversion process



Who We Want

 • proven B2B sales experience

 • strong English spoken and written

 • confident on calls

 • experience in both appointment setting and closing, or very strong closing support

 • able to follow KPIs

 • comfortable selling service-based offers

 • organized, persuasive, and consistent



Important

Please apply only if you have real sales experience that led to revenue or closed business, not only lead generation or customer support.



When applying, answer these clearly

 1. What exactly have you sold before?

 2. Did you only set appointments, or did you also help close deals?

 3. What was your role in the sales process from first contact to signed deal?

 4. What were your KPIs, quotas, or results?

 5. Was your experience B2B or B2C?

 6. Have you sold to US clients?

 7. What CRM tools have you used?

 

Compensation

Trial period first.

Base + performance-based commission.

Compensation depends on experience, sales ability, and fit.

title: Acquisitions Manager
description:
**AVAILABILITY:**



- Part-time availability (10 hours per week).

- Must be willing to work on a Central Standard Time.

- Preferably work 2 hours a day, 5 days a week.

- Able to work from Monday to Friday.



**REQUIREMENTS:**



- Noise Cancelling Headset

- Own Headset and Computer/Laptop

- High Speed Internet must be acceptable speeds



**PREFERENCE:**



We are looking for an experienced Acquisitions Closer with at least 1-2 years of cold-calling experience, specifically in outbound sales or customer service. A background in real estate is required, and we strongly prefer candidates with experience in Surplus Funds or Unclaimed Funds.



The ideal candidate is outgoing, personable, and able to build rapport quickly. Strong communication skills and excellent customer service are essential. We are looking for someone who is ambitious, driven, and results-oriented while maintaining a humble and approachable demeanor. The ability to engage in meaningful conversations without being overly pushy is key, as is a talent for connecting with leads and managing medium to high-volume calls (30-75+ per day). KEY skills is for an individual who can read and understand obituaries and understand family trees in order to reach the point of contact.



This position involves a minimum of 10-25 conversations per day, so we are seeking someone who thrives in a fast-paced, results-driven environment. Applicants must demonstrate proven success in meeting metrics and maintaining professionalism in client interactions. A self-motivated, focused, critical thinker and goal-driven personality is essential for this role.



This is a direct hire opportunity, and we are only considering candidates with relevant experience. If you are humble, a go-getter, smart, and reliable, this is the perfect opportunity for you. Please note that this is not an entry-level position, and applicants without the necessary qualifications will not be considered.



Bonus if has an Upwork account and reviews.



Prior experience in Excess proceeds recovery is a plus, along with prior experience using Pipedrive or manual skiptracing.



**IMPORTANT INSTRUCTION:** Send your applications to 
 and when sending your applications, use "LSE-ACQ" as a subject. Failure to follow instruction will result to your application being rejected.



1. Resume

2. Disc Test - Send us an updated one using this link below: discpersonalitytesting.com/free-disc-test/

3. Video Recording (Tell us a story about your proudest accomplishment in 1 minute)



**COMPENSATION:**



$5/hr 10 hours a week, plus $250 commission per closed deal

title: Graphic Designer (Procreate + Video Creation)
description:
We are looking for a talented and creative Graphic Designer to join our team. Your primary responsibility will be to design high-quality mockups for digital product websites, helping bring our products to life visually and making them shine online.



ABOUT THE ROLE:

This is a full-time remote position where you will work closely with our product and marketing teams to create compelling visual assets. You will be at the heart of how our digital products are presented to the world.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Design professional mockups for digital product pages, landing pages, and sales pages

- Create eye-catching product preview images and promotional graphics using Procreate

- Produce short video content, reels, and promotional videos to showcase digital products

- Develop consistent visual branding across all digital touchpoints

- Collaborate with the team to conceptualize and iterate on design ideas

- Deliver assets in formats optimized for web and social media platforms

- Maintain organized files and design assets for easy team access



REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE:

- Proficient in Procreate (iPad-based illustration and design)

- Experience creating and editing videos (reels, promos, product showcases)

- Strong understanding of design principles, typography, and color theory

- Experience creating mockups for digital products (eBooks, templates, courses, etc.)

- Familiarity with tools such as Canva, Adobe Photoshop, or Illustrator is a plus

- A strong portfolio demonstrating both graphic design and video work

- Attention to detail and ability to meet deadlines

- Good communication skills in English



WHAT WE OFFER:

- Stable, long-term Part-time position

- Remote work from home

- Collaborative and supportive team environment

- Opportunity to grow with the business



Please include a link to your portfolio or examples of your work when applying. We especially want to see mockups, digital product designs, and any videos you have created.

title: Google Ads Management
description:
We are a growing digital marketing agency specializing in eCommerce and consumer brands, and we are looking for a Google Ads Manager who can take true ownership of campaign performance.



This role is not just about managing bids and budgets. We are looking for someone who can analyze performance, identify opportunities, and guide creative direction to improve results.



If you are someone who understands that great performance comes from the combination of data + messaging + creative, this role is for you.



You will be responsible for managing and optimizing Google Ads campaigns across Search, Performance Max, Display, and YouTube.



More importantly, you will be expected to:



+ Identify performance bottlenecks

+ Recommend strategic changes

+ Guide creative direction based on data

+ Communicate clearly about what is working and what needs to change



We value proactive thinking and accountability.



We are not looking for someone who waits for instructions—we are looking for someone who can lead performance improvements.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES 



- Build, manage, and optimize Google Ads campaigns (Search, PMax, Display, YouTube)

- Monitor performance daily and make optimization decisions

- Manage budgets and pacing to ensure efficient spend

- Improve key performance metrics such as:

--ROAS

--CPA

--Conversion Rate

--Click-Through Rate

--Cost per Click

-Conduct keyword research and search term analysis

-Implement negative keyword strategies

-Optimize bidding strategies and audience targeting





Required Qualifications

5+ years managing Google Ads campaigns

Proven experience improving ROAS or lowering CPA

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

Experience with:

Google Ads

GA4

Conversion tracking

Keyword research

A/B testing

Strong written English communication

Ability to explain performance clearly and concisely

title: Senior Marketing & Operations Partner (Luxury Real Estate)
description:
The Role in a Nutshell



This is not a copy-and-paste role. I am looking for a resourceful, technically fearless Virtual Assistant or Marketing Assistant to own the execution of my marketing and operations. I am a luxury real estate agent specializing in Park City, Utah—a high-stakes, highly specific investment market serving high-net-worth clients relocating from the Bay Area, LA, and NYC.

You will not be micromanaged. Instead, you will be given access to world-class coaching resources, templates, and tools. Your job is to be the "Quarterback"—taking those resources, adapting them for a sophisticated, data-aware audience, and turning them into polished content, engaging social media, and efficient systems.



The Philosophy: Ownership over Instructions



* Self-Directed Learner: If a tool is new to you, that's on you to figure out—using AI, YouTube, and whatever else it takes to get up to speed on your own time. The expectation is that you are resourceful enough to reduce your own learning curve. If you need to be told what to do every step of the way, this is not the right fit.

* High Standards: You understand that "good enough" doesn't work for $5M+ listings. You have an eye for luxury aesthetics, a creative mindset, and a commitment to accuracy across all marketing materials.

* Proactive & Professional: You are highly organized, consistently meet deadlines, flag issues, surface ideas, and communicate proactively without being prompted.



Core Responsibilities



* The Resource Orchestrator: Dive into my top-tier real estate coaching platforms to extract relevant strategies and templates. You will "team up" with these resources to execute a world-class marketing strategy.

* Social Media Management: Create high-quality, engaging content across LinkedIn, Instagram,
, YouTube, and Google Business Profile. You will follow a detailed schedule and align all visual output with our luxury brand identity.

*
 Marketing & Newsletters: Own the Mailchimp workflow. Build and send polished weekly campaigns that keep us top-of-mind with a high-net-worth database.

* AI-Assisted Blogging: Write, format, and publish SEO-optimized blog posts directly to WordPress using AI tools and Make.com automations. The goal is original-feeling insight, not "bot-generated" output.

* Web Management: Maintain and update content on a Squarespace website, including landing pages, listings, and other web assets as needed.

* Asset & CRM Management: Act as the digital librarian for our Dropbox (managing high-res photos and 4K video) and assist in the setup and optimization of our CRM to ensure leads are tagged and followed up with.

* Performance Tracking: Monitor engagement across platforms using analytics tools, distilling the data into actionable insights to guide our strategy.

* Market Intelligence: Proactively research Park City market trends, seasonal rhythms, and luxury developments. This isn't knowledge I will hand you; it's research you will do and bring back.





Required Technical Qualifications



* Proven Experience: Background as a VA, Marketing Assistant, or similar role in a real estate setting, with specific responsibility for social media management, content creation, and performance tracking.

* Design & Video: Proficiency in design software (Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, or equivalent) and the ability to edit long-form video into high-quality, short-form reels/snippets.

* Scheduling & Analytics: Experience with social media scheduling tools (Buffer, Hootsuite, Later, etc.) and native platform analytics.

* Web CMS Knowledge: Comfortable in WordPress (publishing/formatting) and Squarespace (page management).

* AI Sophistication: Proven ability to use ChatGPT, Claude, or Midjourney in a sophisticated way—adapting outputs meaningfully rather than posting raw generations.

* Automation Familiarity: Experience building or managing Make.com workflows for content automation.

* Executive Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills with an understanding of SEO basics and white-glove client standards.

* Availability: Available to work primarily during Mountain Time business hours.

Preferred Skills

* Previous experience working directly within a real estate company’s marketing department.

* Deep knowledge of current social media trends, particularly for real estate and luxury marketing.

* Familiarity with both digital and print marketing best practices for real estate.



How to Apply (Please Read Carefully)

To prove you have the attention to detail required for the luxury real estate market, you must follow these specific instructions. Applications that fail to follow these formatting rules will be archived without review.

1. The Subject Line:

Your
 subject line must be formatted exactly as: [Your First Name] | Senior Ops Partner | [Your Favorite Park City Season]

2. The First Sentence:

In the very first sentence of your cover letter, please state the current snow depth or temperature at Park City Mountain Resort. Detail your relevant experience in the remainder of the letter.

3. The Workflow Test:

In your cover letter, explicitly list the three specific AI tools you would use to turn a raw 10-minute Loom video from me into a polished blog post and three LinkedIn snippets. Briefly explain your logic.

4. The Calendar Context:

Briefly describe a project where you successfully built, followed, or managed a marketing calendar/content schedule in a previous role.

5. The Proof (Creative):

Include 3–5 samples of your previous work (social media posts, short-form videos, graphic designs, or blogs created for real estate campaigns). You must include at least one example showing how you used AI as a starting point and meaningfully built on it.

6. The Proof (Analytical):

Include an example of a report or metrics tracker you have previously conducted to show your engagement performance tracking experience.

description:

Hi! I'm Mieke, founder of Hummingbirds — a digital marketing agency based in Belgium. We manage the social media and branding for a diverse portfolio of clients, and we're looking for a talented creative to join us on a freelance basis.



What makes this role different



This is not just a content creation role. We're looking for someone who truly understands branding — and knows how to translate a brand's identity into a consistent, high-quality social media presence. Every post, every visual, every piece of content should feel like it belongs to the brand. That level of attention and craft is what we're after.



What we're looking for



- You have a strong sense of branding and visual identity — you don't just make things look nice, you make them look right

- You're able to pick up a brand's style and carry it through consistently across social media content

- Your design work is premium, polished and high-end

- You have proven experience creating social media content that performs — both visually and strategically

- You're a self-starter who takes ownership and delivers without hand-holding



What the work looks like



You'll be creating social media content for our clients — primarily visual design with a strong branding focus. This is a freelance collaboration, starting with a first project, with the potential for ongoing work across multiple clients.



The level we're aiming for



To give you a clear idea of the quality and style we have in mind, here are some inspiration examples:















Each client has their own unique branding. Your job is to respect that branding 100% — every single visual should feel like a natural extension of that brand. No compromises, no shortcuts. Premium, always.



How to apply



Interested? Please send us your portfolio so we can get a feel for your style and level of work. We're specifically looking to see your social media design work — show us what you're most proud of.

Mieke De Weerdt

description:

I am looking for an engaging and patient Piano Instructor to work with my 10-year-old daughter. She has a keyboard at home and is a total beginner, so I need someone who can build her skills from the ground up. I am looking for a teacher who makes music fun and accessible.

High energy and the ability to keep a student engaged over a video call.

title: Operations Coordinator – Solar & Roofing
description:
Operations Coordinator – Solar & Roofing

Location: Remote but working on Brisbane business hours







About Us



We are a fast-growing solar and roofing company delivering high-quality installations across Brisbane Australia. Unlike many companies, we control our installs, value customer experience, and focus on doing things right the first time.



As we scale, we’re looking for an Operations Coordinator to become the central hub of our business — ensuring every job flows smoothly from sale through to installation and payment.







About the Role



This role is the heartbeat of our operations.



You’ll manage the customer journey from signed contract to completed install, coordinating schedules, handling customer communication, and ensuring all job documentation and payments are completed.



If you love organization, customer service, and keeping moving parts aligned — this role is for you.







Key Responsibilities



 Job & Client Management



 • Create and maintain client files in CRM



 • Manage job documentation and compliance paperwork



 • Track job progress from sale ? install ? payment



Customer Communication



 • Answer customer calls and
s



 • Provide updates on scheduling and install timelines



 • Manage expectations and resolve basic issues



Scheduling & Coordination



 • Book installations and coordinate crews



 • Schedule site visits if required



 • Liaise with installers and suppliers



Work Orders & Admin



 • Process work orders



 • Ensure all job details are accurate before install



 • Coordinate permits and approvals (if applicable)



 Invoicing & Payment Follow-up



 • Ensure invoices are sent



 • Follow up outstanding payments



 • Support finance/bookkeeping team with job costing info







What We’re Looking For



Essential



Strong organisation & attention to detail



Confident on the phone with customers



Experience scheduling jobs or coordinating teams



Ability to manage multiple jobs at once



Tech-savvy (CRM systems, Google Workspace, job management software)



Highly Regarded



Experience in solar, roofing, construction, or trades



 Experience with job management software (e.g. ServiceM8)



Understanding of install workflows







Personality Fit



You are:



 • Calm under pressure

 • Great with customers



 • Highly organised



 • A natural problem solver







Why Join Us?

Work closely with leadership and influence operations



 Be part of a team that values quality and customer experience



Flexible work options (if applicable)



Competitive salary for the right person



Please send me a Message and apply with the word APPLE in the first sentence so I know you pay attention to details.



Also outline how your previous experience relates directly to what we are doing!

title: Dispute Specialist in Stripe & Airwallex
description:
We are currently seeking a dedicated Dispute Resolution Specialist to join our team and manage disputes effectively 7 days a week part time, solving all disputes daily. 



Key Responsibilities:



Dispute Management:

- Handle disputes across Stripe and AirWallex platforms, ensuring timely and accurate resolution.

- Review customer communications and escalate as needed to close disputes in accordance with our SOPs

- Compile, submit, and manage dispute evidence to ensure the best possible outcomes.



Customer Outreach:

- Knows how to reach out to customers to close Klarna inquiries and disputes



Documentation and Reporting:

- Gather and organize necessary documents to support winning dispute cases.

- Calculate dispute fees accurately and provide detailed monthly reports on dispute trends and outcomes for all stores.



Requirements:

- Proven experience managing Stripe and AirWallex disputes. (Klarna disputes)

title: Expert Video Editor - Davinci
description:
** PLEASE READ ALL THE INSTRUCTIONS & ONLY APPLY IF YOU HAVE EXTENSIVE VIDEO EDITING EXPERIENCE**



Are you a talented video editor with a passion for creating captivating, fast-paced social media videos? I’m looking for a skilled professional to finalize high-quality 1-2 minute videos for my social media platforms.



About the Role



I need a highly dependable, truly exceptional video editor who can learn to replicate my video editing style. This role involves quick turn around times and large amounts of footage. I need someone passionate about storytelling and who has a great eye for selecting the best 
nts out of hundreds (sometimes thousands) of clips and arranging them in a way that goes along with a voiceover in the most compelling and powerful way possible.



You'll be assisting my team of video editors by stepping in during the second half of the video creation process, working with raw, already chopped footage, voiceovers, and initial edits I’ve prepared to produce videos ready for another tea
mber to color grade. Each project will involve 20 minutes to 2 hours of pre-chopped footage, which you’ll sift through to select the best clips and create a 1–2 1/2 minute video that tells a compelling story.



Our team includes a part time video color-grader and captioner so most likely you will not be color grading or captioning the final videos. You will be our expert clip arranger who can arrange the footage according to my voiceover in a compelling way, using only the very best pieces of footage available.



This is a per project roll that pays $35 USD a video, with 3-7 videos a week. Our video output fluctuates, so some weeks there may be more work available for you if you'd like it.



My ideal video editor must be confident that they can create videos in my signature style:



Example 1: 

Example 2: 

Example 3: 





Key Responsibilities



- Edit and arrange video clips to align with pre-recorded voiceovers.



- Review and narrow down footage to select the most compelling clips.



- Craft engaging and visually appealing videos that flow naturally and tell a cohesive story.



- Incorporate relevant visuals such as screen recordings, maps, and on-screen text when necessary.



- Ensure videos feature dynamic intros/hooks to capture viewers' attention and match with video intros I've created in the past.



- Collaborate via DaVinci for seamless project sharing and updates.





What I’m Looking For



- Proven Expertise: Advanced video editing skills with a portfolio of engaging short-form content.



- Proficiency in DaVinci



- Attention to Detail: Ability to identify and highlight the best 
nts in raw footage.



- Storytelling Skills: Strong sense of pacing and narrative structure.



- Social Media Savvy: Familiarity with the style and trends of platforms like TikTok and Instagram.



- An editor who can create videos in my signature style.





- What I Provide



- Raw footage and voiceovers for each project.



- Clear direction and collaboration throughout the editing process.



- Flexibility to foster creativity and innovation in the editing process.





How to Apply:



1. Change the subject line to how many years experience you have editing videos



2. (IMPORTANT) Provide links to 3-5 specific videos you've edited that showcase your abilities to create videos like my example videos. Please do not give any examples of talking-head style videos.



3. Please send your portfolio



4. Answer the following questions:



- Kindly illustrate how the linked videos you've provided demonstrate your suitability for the role and why you would excel in editing travel and vlog videos.



- What software do you use to edit videos? And are you willing to use Davinci for an easier collaboration process?



- Do you have any other experience that will make you a perfect fit for the job?



- Do you feel confident that you can edit 3-5 high quality videos each week, for $35 USD a video?



- Are you open to doing a paid test task?



Thank you for your time, and I look forward to chatting with you!

title: Video & Photo Editor (High-End Architecture & Lighting Design)
description:
Overview: I am a professional architectural photographer (The H Design Studio) specializing in high-end lighting design and commercial interiors. I am looking for a long-term creative partner to handle two specific tasks:

Video Editing: Transforming professional 4K footage/stills into sophisticated, rhythmic Instagram Reels.

Photo Geometry: Performing precise perspective corrections and object removal in Lightroom Classic.



My work is about the interplay of light and clean geometry. I need an editor who understands "editorial" pacing—minimalist, clean, and high-end.



The Workflow (Crucial):



Software: You must be proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro and Lightroom Classic.



The Sync: We will use a Lightroom Catalog workflow. I will send you a "Smart Preview" catalog; you will fix the geometry and perform cleanups (removing exit signs, sensors, etc.), and send the catalog back for me to color grade.

Frequency: 1 high-quality Reel per week + geometry/cleanup for ~10–15 stills per project.

Aesthetic: Think "Architectural Digest" or "High-End Design Firm," NOT "Generic Real Estate/Influencer."



The Application (Required): Please provide a portfolio or 2–3 specific examples of your work. I am specifically looking for:

Sophisticated Typography: Minimalist fonts with intentional tracking/spacing.

Rhythmic Transitions: No "flashy" or "cheap" transitions. Cuts must snap perfectly to the beat of the music.

Geometry Precision: An eye for perfectly vertical lines and clean architectural "Uprights."



The Test (Paid): I will select top candidates for a paid trial. I will provide a Lightroom Smart Preview catalog for 3 images and assets for a 15-second Reel.

Task: Fix geometry/cleanup on 3 photos + edit 1 Reel.

Rate: Please state your hourly rate in USD.



How to Apply:

Link your portfolio (Architecture/Design focus preferred).

Confirm you are comfortable with the Lightroom Catalog/Smart Preview workflow.

Briefly explain your approach to "syncing to a beat."

Confirm your availability for a weekly 2–4 hour commitment.

title: Video Editor
description:
Video Editor

Media Production & AI Technology  |  Full-Time  |  Remote

OnlineJobs.ph  |  Philippines-Based





ABOUT THE COMPANY

This role supports two US-based companies under shared leadership.

Upscale Media LLC is a premiu
dia company producing cinematic wedding films through Bordeaux Weddings, sorority recruitment and event media through Sorority Nation, and ongoing creative partnerships for non-profit organizations, brands, and mission-driven clients. The work spans wedding cinema, event coverage, campaign content, social media assets, and recurring media partnerships — all held to a premium editorial standard.

Angry Digital Inc. is a US-based AI technology company building Nexeo.ai — an AI Search Intelligence platform that helps digital agencies track, measure, and optimize how their clients appear in AI-powered search results (ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Perplexity, and more). We’re a fast-moving founding team backed by real revenue from our e-commerce portfolio and owned media properties. This is a ground-floor opportunity at a company building category-defining software.

Your workload will be split across both entities: premium cinematic, event, and brand content for Upscale Media, and podcast, promotional, and product content for Angry Digital.





THE ROLE

You’ll be the primary editing engine across both companies. On the Upscale Media side, that means cinematic wedding films, sorority recruitment videos, event recaps, and social clips. On the Angry Digital side, you’ll edit podcast episodes, cut promotional clips, and produce brand content. You’re not building creative strategy from scratch — you’re receiving raw footage, references, and creative direction, then delivering polished, on-brand edits with speed and consistency. You’ll work directly with the COO and production team, follow established SOPs, and own your turnaround deadlines.





CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

Edit cinematic wedding highlight films, ceremony edits, and feature-length wedding films for Bordeaux Weddings

Edit sorority recruitment films, bid day recaps, philanthropy videos, and event content for Sorority Nation

Edit podcast episodes and produce short-form clip packages for the Angry Digital Podcast

Cut short-form social clips (15–60 seconds) from long-form content for Instagram, TikTok, and LinkedIn

Produce brand and product content for Angry Digital Inc. and Nexeo.ai as needed

Sync and manage multi-cam and multi-audio source footage, including external recorders and drone footage

Color grade and color correct footage to match brand-specific looks and client expectations

Follow established editing SOPs, naming conventions, and project file structures

Manage assets through cloud-based review and delivery platforms (
, Dropbox, Replay)

Execute revisions within defined revision windows — typically two rounds per deliverable

Maintain consistent turnaround timelines and communicate proactively on delivery status

Organize and archive raw footage, project files, and final exports with proper folder structure

Create motion graphics, lower thirds, and title cards as needed for branded content





REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

2+ years of professional video editing experience with a strong portfolio of completed work

Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro — this is the primary editing platform across all brands

Solid understanding of color grading workflows (Lumetri, DaVinci Resolve, or equivalent)

Experience editing wedding films, event content, or cinematic short-form projects

Ability to sync multi-source audio and manage multi-cam timelines cleanly

Strong sense of pacing, storytelling, and emotional tone — especially for cinematic and narrative-driven edits

Comfortable working with large file volumes including 4K footage and Blackmagic RAW (BRAW)

Detail-oriented with the ability to follow brand guidelines, SOPs, and revision checklists without dropping quality

Reliable high-speed internet and a capable editing workstation (you supply your own hardware)

Clear communication skills in English — written updates, revision notes, and delivery confirmations

Willingness to work with some US ET overlap (minimum 3–4 hours daily)





BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)

Experience with DaVinci Resolve as a secondary editing or grading tool

Motion graphics capability in After Effects (lower thirds, title sequences, transitions)

Drone footage editing experience

Familiarity with cloud review platforms like 
 or Replay

Podcast or long-form audio editing experience (Descript, Audition, or similar)

Experience with AI-assisted editing tools (e.g., Autopod, Descript, Opus Clip) for workflow acceleration

Basic sound design and audio mixing skills beyond simple dialogue sync

Experience editing content for sorority, Greek life, or event-driven organizations





COMPENSATION & DETAILS

Salary:  $450–600/month depending on experience

Type: Full-time (40 hours/week)

Schedule: Monday–Friday, flexible with minimum 3–4 hour US ET overlap

Location: 100% Remote (Philippines-based)

Benefits: 13th-month pay, performance bonuses, compensation growth tied to output quality and reliability, clear path to Senior Editor or Post-Production Lead as we scale





HOW TO APPLY

Send your resume, a link to your editing reel or portfolio (3–5 pieces showing range across cinematic, event, and/or short-form work), and a short Loom video (under 3 minutes) walking through one editing project from import to export — show us your timeline, your process, and how you organize your workflow. We want to see how you think, not just what you deliver. Bonus points if your Loom shows your actual screen and tools, not just a talking head.

Applications without a portfolio/reel and a Loom video will not be reviewed.

description:
Full-Time Administrative & Operations Assistant (Remote, MDT Hours)



I’m looking for a long-term, detail-oriented administrative and operations assistant to help manage daily operations across sales, content, communication, and internal systems for a growing company.



This role is fast-paced and requires handling multiple tasks throughout the day without constant supervision.



You will be expected to complete tasks accurately, especially around scheduling, pipeline updates, and follow-ups.



This is a full-time role. If you are currently juggling multiple jobs, this will not be a fit.



Compensation

Raise schedule: $1/hour increase each year

Expected pay after 2 years: $10/hour



Schedule & Availability

No weekend work required

s with meeting notes

 Management

s are prioritized and responded to quickly (I will still review everything manually for the first few months)

Descript

WordPress

Go High Level

Instantly

n8n

Important Notes

title: Senior Video Editor (US-Based Brand / PST Schedule)
description:
About Veritas Vans

Veritas Vans builds the most trusted accessories for Starlink Mini and Starlink Standard. Our mission is to give people the freedom to work, explore, and stay connected anywhere. From Baja coastlines to deep forest trails, our customers rely on our gear for capability, protection, and unlimited connection.



Your role is to help visually tell this story across all platforms.



Role Overview

We are hiring a Senior Video Editor who can own our long-form YouTube content, high-retention short-form content, and graphic design needs. You must be highly experienced, creative, fast, and able to work autonomously within a growing brand.



Responsibilities



Video Editing – Long Form

- Edit 6–15 minute YouTube videos with strong retention, pacing, and narrative clarity.

- Add b-roll, overlays, captions, music, and brand-consistent graphics.

- Build engaging openings with proven YouTube hook methods.



Video Editing – Short Form

- Execute the Hook ? Retain ? Reward method for Reels, TikTok, and Shorts.

- Add dynamic subtitles, zooms, cuts, 
 inserts, and pacing adjustments.

- Produce scroll-stopping, high-retention content.



Graphic Design & Photo Editing

- Create YouTube thumbnails and graphic assets.

- Design text treatments, overlays, and promotional visuals.

- Edit lifestyle and product photos for multi-platform use.



Brand Storytelling

- Align all edits with our brand themes: freedom, connection, capability, control.

- Contribute creative ideas and concepts for future video content.



AI-Driven Editing & Workflow Optimization

- Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, Topaz, Descript, etc.) as a core part of your editing workflow.

- Generate high-performing hooks, captions, and on-screen text callouts using AI.

- Use AI to research and improve storytelling, pacing, and content structure.

- Continuously explore and implement new AI workflows to improve output quality, speed, and efficiency.

- Leverage AI to enhance both creative output and production throughput, not just assist basic tasks.



Cross-Platform Optimization

- Edit in multiple aspect ratios: 16:9, 9:16, 4:5, 1:1.

- Prepare final deliverables in organized, structured folders.

- Optimize content for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok,
.



Collaboration

- Work closely with the content team and leadership.

- Follow SOPs and meet deadlines consistently.

- Join scheduled calls proactively (no reminders required)

- Be punctual and prepared for feedback sessions



Work Discipline & Delivery Standards

- Be actively available and responsive during working hours (PST schedule).

- Address tasks, revisions, and team communication within working hours.

- Meet deadlines consistently and communicate early if delays occur.

- Submit deliverables early in the workday whenever possible to allow time for review and revisions.



Quality & Output Standards

- Deliver edits that are near publish-ready on first submission.

- Ensure drafts require minimal revisions and are not incomplete or partially executed.

- Perform a full self-review before submission to ensure:

- all feedback is applied

title: Guest Support for a Short Term Rental
description:
ROLE OVERVIEW

We are seeking a Guest Support & Operations Analyst to manage overnight guest communications and support key backend operations. This role combines guest relations, reservation management, and administrative tasks to ensure seamless service and operational accuracy.



IMPORTANT NOTE ABOUT THIS ROLE

- This is NOT a generic support role.

- You’ll be juggling guests, cleaners, and maintenance teams in real time — often with imperfect information and real consequences if poor decisions are made. Because of that, our hiring process is intentionally more challenging than a typical “message responder” position.

- The assessment you’re about to take is designed to understand how you think — how you prioritize, communicate, and make judgment calls when there isn’t one obvious right answer.

- If you enjoy solving realistic scenarios, thinking critically, and taking ownership, you will likely enjoy both this assessment and the job itself. If you are looking for a simple, scripted support role, this probably won’t be the right fit — and that’s okay.

Guest Communications & Support

Qualifications

title: Full-Stack Developer Needed for Spec-Driven AI ESL Web App (Milestone-Based MVP)
description:
Full-Stack Developer Needed for Spec-Driven AI ESL Web App (Milestone-Based MVP)



I am an ESL (English as a Second Language) instructor building a simple, focused web application for teachers.



The goal of the app is to allow teachers to paste any text and instantly generate structured lesson materials.



This is an MVP (minimum viable product). The design, layout, and behavior are already fully defined and must be followed exactly. This is a spec-driven build, not a design project.



I am looking for a developer who can execute cleanly, follow detailed specifications, and build the project in milestones.



?



What You Will Build



A web app with:

 • Two-panel layout (desktop)

 • Left: text input and generated output

 • Right: lesson settings

 • Core features

 • Paste text input

 • Select lesson options (checkboxes with quantity inputs)

 • Generate content using OpenAI (ChatGPT API)

 • Toggle between “Original” and “Leveled” content (no page reload)

 • Regenerate output

 • View previous version

 • Download DOCX file (clean, formatted)

 • Mobile responsiveness

 • Desktop: two-pane layout

 • Mobile: stacked vertical layout

 • Stripe integration

 • Stripe should be integrated during the MVP build

 • It will not be active at launch

 • It should be set up so payment/subscription features can be turned on later without a major rebuild



?



Technical Requirements

 • Frontend: React (preferred) or similar modern framework

 • Backend: Node.js (or similar)

 • AI Integration: OpenAI API (ChatGPT)

 • File Export: DOCX generation

 • Payment Integration: Stripe (inactive at launch, ready for later activation)



?



Important Notes

 • Full Balsamiq layout will be provided

 • Full functional specification (UI + behavior) will be provided

 • Full UI color specification will be provided

 • Inspiration images for visual direction will be provided

 • You must follow the provided structure and behavior exactly

 • Do not redesign the interface



?



Validation and Fixer Layer (Important)



The system must include both a validation layer and a fixer layer.



Validation Layer



AI-generated output must be automatically checked before being shown to the user.



The validator should detect issues such as:

 • missing or blank answers

 • incorrect or incomplete answer keys

 • malformed question sets

 • formatting inconsistencies

 • broken structure in generated output



Fixer Layer



If issues are detected, the system should automatically correct them before the user sees the result.



This may include:

 • automatically regenerating the full output

 • regenerating only the broken section

 • correcting formatting issues

 • ensuring the final output is clean and usable



This entire process must be:

 • seamless

 • automatic

 • invisible to the user



The goal is for the teacher to receive output that is reliable, classroom-ready, and does not require extra fixing.



?



Milestones (Important)



This project will be completed in phases. Not all features will be built at once.



Milestone 1 – Core UI Build

 • Build the frontend interface exactly according to the provided spec

 • Implement two-panel layout

 • Implement scrollable panel behavior

 • Implement fixed bottom action area

 • Ensure responsive layout (desktop and mobile)



Milestone 2 – Core Generation Workflow

 • Integrate OpenAI (ChatGPT API)

 • Generate output based on user input and selected settings

 • Implement toggle between “Original” and “Leveled”

 • Implement regenerate and previous version behavior



Milestone 3 – DOCX Export + Validation/Fixer Layer

 • Implement clean DOCX export

 • Implement validation layer

 • Implement fixer layer

 • Ensure output is usable and consistently formatted



Milestone 4 – Stripe Setup

 • Integrate Stripe in inactive mode

 • Prepare payment/subscription system for later activation

 • No live payments at launch



Each milestone will be reviewed and approved before moving to the next.



?



What I’m Looking For

 • Strong attention to detail

 • Ability to follow specifications precisely

 • Experience building clean, simple web apps

 • Experience working with OpenAI API

 • Experience with Stripe integration

 • Good communication

 • Comfortable working in milestone-based phases



?



Budget

 • Target: $1,000–$2,000 total for MVP

 • Payment will be milestone-based



?



To Apply



Please include:

 1. Examples of similar web apps you’ve built

 2. Your experience with OpenAI API

 3. Your experience with Stripe integration

 4. A short message confirming you understand this is a spec-driven, milestone-based build

 5. Briefly explain how you would approach the validator + fixer layer



?



Bonus Question



Please answer this in your application:



How would you implement a fixed action bar with a scrollable settings panel?

title: AI Video Producer – Higgsfield Specialist
description:
Remote | Part-Time | Long-Term



Who We Are:

We produce fully automated, AI-generated short-form finance content for a high-growth creator persona. The character is established, the scripts are written, the images are provided — we just need someone who can make the videos look real.



The Role:

We're looking for a Higgsfield expert to produce 3 videos per day, every day using pre-supplied static character images and pre-written scripts. Your only job is execution — taking our inputs and outputting photorealistic, high-quality AI videos that look like a real human filmed them.



If you can make AI footage that doesn't look like AI footage, this role is for you.



Here is the page: 
 



What You'll Be Doing:



Producing 3 x 45–90 second AI videos daily using Higgsfield

Working from 3 static character reference images and 3 new scripts (provided by us each day)

Maintaining consistent character likeness, motion quality, and lip sync across every video

Submitting completed videos for review and incorporating feedback quickly



What We're Looking For

Required:



Proven Higgsfield experience — real outputs, not demos



Strong eye for realism — you spot what looks "off" and fix it before submitting

Ability to maintain character consistency across high-volume daily production

Reliable, async communicator who hits deadlines without chasing

Ability edit the final video in capcut with retention edits and zooms



Preferred:



Experience with AI persona or faceless creator projects

Familiarity with higgsfield or ai character / video generation (kling, nano banano etc)

Background in video editing



The Details:



3 videos per day, every day

title: Work-from-Home Opportunity with Australian Criminal Law Firm – Long-Term Role | Weekend Shift (Sunday-Thursday)
description:
Work-from-Home Opportunity with Australian Criminal Law Firm – Long-Term Role | Weekend Shift (Sunday- Thursday)



We are a criminal law firm based in Australia, previously working with external call centres, but now building our dedicated in-house remote team. We currently have 5 valued tea
mbers based in the Philippines and are looking to add a Sixth for a long-term position.







Position Overview



This is a home-based, full-time role with the potential to earn up to PHP 100,000/month — starting at PHP 50,000 during training, with a raise to PHP 81,500 post-training, and bonuses up to PHP 10,000 based on commissions.







Schedule & Hours



-Permanent shift: From Sunday- Thursday



-Days off: Friday- Saturday



-11.5 hours per day (including a 45-minute lunch break)



-Working hours: 7:00 AM to approx. 6:30 PM ( There will be a rotation of roster so there are weeks where you only work from 6 AM to 2 PM Philippine time (aligned with Australian business hours and nightphones)



-Training schedule: Monday to Friday until fully trained



- Entitled to 15 vacation leaves







Your Duties Will Include:



-Answering incoming calls and handling client inquiries professionally



-Recording call details and booking appointments in our database



-Learning the basics of criminal law in Australia



-Providing frontline call management and transferring messages



-Managing live chat inquiries



- Collecting payment during after-hrs only



-Assisting with after-hours and weekend nightphones





What We're Looking For:



-Fluent English speaker with strong writing and spelling skills



-Reliable computer, high-speed internet, second monitor, and quality headphones (Bluetooth is preferred)



-Availability for full-time work only — no side jobs or agency representation



-A strong team player who is eager to learn, grow, and contribute long-term



-Willingness to work on Philippine holidays (with holiday pay already factored in)



-Rarely take leaves on a weekend.







Why Join Us?



-Work closely with a team of 35+ Australian lawyers and staff



-Join a growing and stable firm that values its remote team



-Receive thorough training and continuous support



-Enjoy long-term stability — our current PH team has been with us for 3+ years



-We pay the 13th month and offer performance-based bonuses







How to Apply:



-Please submit a voice and video introduction (e.g., via Vocaroo) sharing:



-A short introduction about yourself



-Your relevant experience



-Why you think you’d be a great fit for this role



-Provide your resume as well.



- Provide a typing test



-Only applicants who submit a voice or video introduction will be considered.







Do NOT apply if:



You’re an agency



You plan to take on another job



You don’t meet the equipment or availability requirements



We use real-time communication tools during working hours, and full commitment to this role is essential.







This is a great opportunity to join a respected and fast-growing Australian law firm ( Dribbin & Brown Criminal Lawyers). Before joining, we’re happy to connect you with our current Filipino staff so you can hear firsthand about the role and work environment.



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: High-Performance Appointment Setter / Sales Assistant (Fitness Coaching Business)
description:
If you’re looking for an “easy” job where you can coast, follow a script, and do the bare minimum…



This is not for you.



We are building a high-performance online fitness coaching business, and we are looking for someone who wants to be part of a fast-paced, high-pressure, results-driven environment.



This role is for A-players only who are motivated for high levels of success.



???? Do NOT apply if:



You are not competitive

You are not driven by targets, bonuses, and progression

You struggle in high-pressure, fast-paced environments

You need constant hand-holding or motivation

You are just looking for “stable income” without growth



If that’s you — this will not be a good fit.



? This IS for you if:



You are highly driven and want to win

You take ownership and responsibility for results

You thrive under pressure and tight targets

You are motivated by bonuses, commission, and progression

You want to grow into a senior role over time



???? The Role:



You will be responsible for managing and converting conversations across two pipelines:



Organic traffic (Instagram, inbound leads, etc.)

Paid traffic (warmer leads, but still require strong qualification & follow-up)



Your responsibilities will include:



Managing daily conversations with leads

Qualifying prospects effectively

Booking calls into the calendar

Following up with short-term and long-term leads

Handling both hot leads (ready now) and nurture leads (not ready yet)

Keeping pipelines organised and moving consistently



This is not just replying to messages — this is driving conversations toward booked calls and revenue.



We operate on a DM-to-Call-to-Close model — your role is critical in that process.



???? Performance Expectations:



High activity, every day

Fast response times

Strong organisation across multiple conversations

Consistent booking targets

Ability to improve and optimise over time



We are not looking for average.



???? Compensation:



Base salary + performance-based bonuses

Commission tied to results

Clear progression opportunities for top performers



If you perform, you will be rewarded.



???? Application Process (IMPORTANT):



If you are serious about this role, do the following:



Send a 3–5 minute Loom video covering:



Your experience with similar roles

Why you believe you would be a strong fit

Why you thrive in high-pressure, target-driven environments



Any application without a Loom will be ignored.



Final Note:



We are building something serious here.



If you want to grow, be challenged, and be rewarded based on performance — this could be a great opportunity.



If not — no problem, but this isn’t the role for you.

title: Marketing project manager

)

Proven ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines

Strong written and verbal communication skills

Experience coordinating remote teams or contractors



Preferred Qualifications:



Experience in agency or client-service environments

Key Skills:



Organization and attention to detail

Time management and prioritization

Smooth coordination between tea
mbers and stakeholders
