title: SOCIAL MEDIA CONTENT & EXECUTION SPECIALIST
description:
???? VIDEO INTERVIEW REQUIRED — NO VIDEO = NO REVIEW ????



We run a premium ecommerce brand (Modern Viking) focused on personalised gifting.



We are hiring someone to execute and improve our social media content so it supports brand perception, ads, and sales.



This is not a basic posting role. If your experience is just Canva posts and captions, do not apply.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

, and TikTok

PERFORMANCE FOCUS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

• Content quality (premium look and feel)

• Engagement (real engagement, not fake metrics)

You will not guess. You will improve based on what is already working.



FIRST TASK (REQUIRED)

• Review our website and social pages

WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

title: Operations Coordinator / Customer Success
description:
POSITION OVERVIEW

The Operations Coordinator owns the daily operational rhythm of REVAMP Visuals. Acting as the central hub between field teams, editors, customer service, and leadership, this role ensures every project is executed efficiently, communicated clearly, and delivered to brand standards.



This position requires decisive coordination, proactive problem-solving, and systems thinking. The Operations Coordinator not only manages logistics but continuously improves workflows, strengthens accountability, and safeguards the client experience as the company scales.



Working hours are 9:00am - 5:00pm Eastern Time with a 1 hour lunch break.



Summary

The Operations Coordinator will play a pivotal role in the day-to-day operations of our organization. This individual will support the smooth execution of our production projects and daily operations, ensuring everything runs seamlessly from pre-production to post-production. This role is ideal for someone passionate about media and production, with strong organizational and communication skills, and a proactive approach. The ideal candidate will possess strong leadership capabilities, a strong customer service background, and a track record of achieving operational excellence.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



Daily

Manage and oversee internal scheduling for Media Pros and editors

Coordinate and dispatch same-day or next-day urgent changes

Update project timelines and appointment calendars

Route client communication to appropriate tea
mbers and track resolution

Ensure client response times remain within 10–20 minutes during operating hours

Set clear next-day follow-ups when needed

Lead and manage client communications to ensure proactive updates

Oversee and adjust team schedules across departments (Field, Editing, Customer Service)

Support Quality Control workflows to uphold brand and delivery standards

Funnel important updates from field teams and clients into centralized systems

Provide consultative support on upgrades and service options



Weekly

Host weekly team sync meetings to review bottlenecks, timelines, and priorities

Lead weekly task check-ins and monitor internal accountability

Report on project statuses and departmental KPIs

Coordinate with cross-functional teams (Creative, Customer Service, Sales)

Analyze recurring project issues and propose system improvements

Support onboarding of new tea
mbers and freelancers

Contribute to lead generation or outreach initiatives as requested



Monthly

Compile and report on key performance metrics (revenue, retention, production success, workflow health)

Identify trends in client requests or operational inefficiencies

Implement system, communication, and quality improvements

Review and document SOP updates to maintain operational standards

Participate in monthly strategic planning and forecasting sessions

Support hiring, onboarding, and training initiatives



KEY PERFORMANCE INDICATORS (KPIs)

Client response time compliance

On-time project completion rate

Quality control pass rate

Schedule accuracy and resource allocation efficiency

Reduction in recurring workflow issues

Team accountability follow-through

Client satisfaction and retention



SKILLS & QUALIFICATIONS

Strong operational and project coordination experience

Excellent written and verbal communication skills

High proficiency in CRM systems, Google Workspace, and scheduling tools

Ability to manage multiple workflows simultaneously

Experience leading cross-department collaboration

Strong organizational and time management skills

Proactive problem solver with systems-thinking mindset

Comfortable managing deadlines and high-volume production environments



To Apply

Please send us the following:

A 1–2 minute video introducing yourself — tell us where you’re from, what kind of work you’ve done before, and why you’re a great fit for this Operations Coordinator / Customer Success role.

Confirmation that you are available to work 9:00am–5:00pm Eastern Time, Monday through Friday.

A screenshot of your internet speed test and your OnlineJobs.ph DISC Profile.

One or two sentences answering: “What makes a great client experience?”



We’re excited to meet you — bonus points if your video shows energy, professionalism, and clear communication.

title: Product Researcher
description:
We are a up and coming e-commerce brand looking for a sharp, trend-obsessed Product Researcher to join our team. Your mission is to identify "winning" products before they go mainstream. You will be responsible for scouting high-potential products, analyzing competitor data, and identifying the "visual hooks" that will make a product viral on TikTok and Shopify.



Key Responsibilities:



- Trend Scouting: Scour TikTok Creative Center, Minea, PiPiADS, and organic FYP feeds to find products with high engagement and "problem-solving" appeal.

- Competitor Analysis: Identify top-selling stores, analyze their pricing strategy, and find "gaps" where we can offer a better version or better marketing.

- Data Validation: Use tools like AliShark or Shophunter to verify sales volume and demand trends for 2026.

- Creative Briefing: For every product found, you must identify at least three "3-second hooks" that would work for a TikTok ad.

- AI Integration: Ability to use Gemini or ChatGPT to quickly summarize product benefits and customer pain points.



Efficiency: Ability to work independently and meet strict daily research quotas.



Why Join Us?



Remote Work: 100% virtual position.

Scalability focus: We are moving from dropshipping to an owned brand; you will be a key part of our growth.

Performance Bonuses: Weekly bonuses for every "winner" product that hits a specific sales milestone.

title: Amazon Launch / ECommerce Operations Manager
description:
Please read carefully, this is NOT a Amazon listing optimization or VA role. 



About the Role

We’re looking for an experienced Amazon Brand Launch Manager to oversee the full setup and launch of two separate food brands on Amazon. This role involves coordinating everything from Brand Registry setup to packaging consulting, logistics, and listing. This is equal project management, consulting and operations. You should be deeply familiar with Amazon Seller Central, FBA shipping workflows, and food product compliance.



This is a project-based contract role with potential for ongoing work as we expand.



Responsibilities

-Provide clear project timelines, updates, and documentation for each step

Qualifications

Proven experience launching and managing food or CPG brands on Amazon (FBA experience required)

Strong knowledge of Amazon Brand Registry, packaging compliance, and FBA requirements

Familiar with SKU management, barcodes (UPC/FNSKU), and inventory systems

Excellent project management and communication skills

Detail-oriented and highly organized

Bonus Experience



Familiarity with pallet logistics 





Contract Details

Project-based role (approx. 2–3 months)

Flexible remote schedule, strong communication required

Compensation based on experience and project scope



How to Apply

Respond to this listing with the subject “Amazon Brand Launch Manager – [Your Name]”

Hourly or project-based rate

title: Brand & Content Manager — U.S. Medical Practice ($1,400–$1,600/mo, Full-Time)
description:
We believe people suffer because they're misaligned — with their biology, their purpose, and the systems they live inside. 



Our work is about changing that.



This is a U.S.-based psychiatric practice led by an Ivy League-trained female physician specializing in women's mental health, hormonal health, and complex diagnostic care. We help women understand their own design and align with the highest version of themselves — biologically, psychologically, and spiritually. 



The practice is supported by an all-women operations team.



We are building a brand that carries this mission to a much larger audience — through content that educates, positions, and converts. Not influencer content. Not wellness content. Physician-led authority content that helps the right people find us and arrive ready to commit.



We need the person who will own that brand's content presence. Someone who believes in this mission enough to protect it.



How we work:

The founder directs the vision. AI scaffolds our thinking — generating drafts, analyzing trends, multiplying content across platforms. Nobody here stops thinking. Your role is to execute with judgment, taste, and precision. You take AI-generated output and the founder's original material, refine it to meet the brand standard, and make sure it reaches the right audience on the right platform at the right time.

You are not replaced by AI. You manage AI. As tools evolve, you adopt them, integrate them into the workflow, and remain the human quality gate that ensures nothing goes live that doesn't serve the mission.



What a typical week looks like:

— Take the founder's monthly long-form videos and voice memos and repurpose them into 8-12 short-form clips (YouTube Shorts, Reels, Instagram) using AI tools, then refine and approve each one

— Format and schedule 1-2 Substack newsletters from the founder's essays or voice memos

— Design 4-6 carousels, quote cards, and branded graphics across LinkedIn, X, Instagram

— Build and maintain
 marketing sequences — automated nurture flows, segmentation, and campaigns that grow the list and convert audience into patients

— Review all AI-generated content for brand voice, accuracy, and quality before posting

— Schedule and post across LinkedIn, Substack, X, Instagram, and YouTube

— Track weekly performance metrics and bring data-backed recommendations on what's working

— Kill anything that doesn't meet the standard before it goes public

Requirements:

— C1/C2 English (written and verbal) — non-negotiable

— 3+ years in content production and brand building — professional services, luxury, health, or thought leadership preferred. E-commerce alone does not qualify. If you've done this work but your title didn't reflect it, we still want to hear from you.

— Fluency across LinkedIn, Instagram, YouTube, X, and a newsletter platform (Substack preferred)

—
 marketing experience — automated sequences, audience segmentation, conversion-focused strategy

— Video editing proficiency (CapCut, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut)

— AI content and video tool experience (OpusClip, Vizard, Descript, HeyGen, Synthesia, Runway, Canva AI, or similar)

— Strong Canva or Figma skills

— SEO and discoverability knowledge — YouTube optimization, keyword strategy

— Portfolio showing premium, restrained brand work — clean and authoritative, not flashy

— Central Time hours (Mon–Fri, 8 AM–5 PM CT)



Nice to have: Podcast production, motion graphics.



Compensation: $1,400–$1,600/month based on experience. Long-term position. Leadership-track role that grows into Director of Content & Brand as the practice scales toward book publication, a national podcast, and speaking engagements. The brand you build here becomes your signature work.

Hiring process: Selected candidates begin with a paid trial period before moving into the full role.



To apply, send ALL of the following:

1) Portfolio — live account links to feeds you manage or have managed preferred. If not available, send a comprehensive portfolio showing actual content you've created across platforms.

2) Voice memo or Loom video (2–3 min, English) — introduce yourself, tell us about a brand you built or managed, and explain the difference between an authority brand and a visibility brand.

3) Resume.



Only complete applications will be reviewed.



This brand exists because the world needs a better way to help people align with who they actually are. If that resonates — and your standard is "is this the best version of what this brand would say?" before anything goes live — apply.

title: Sales Operations Specialist
description:

ABOUT THE COMPANY

Angry Digital Inc. is a US-based AI technology company building Nexeo.ai — an AI Search Intelligence platform that helps digital agencies track, measure, and optimize how their clients appear in AI-powered search results (ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Perplexity, and more). We’re a fast-moving founding team backed by real revenue from our e-commerce portfolio and owned media properties. This is a ground-floor opportunity at a company building category-defining software.





THE ROLE

You’ll be the engine behind our sales pipeline. Our Head of Sales needs a sharp, detail-oriented operator who can research prospects, qualify leads, manage CRM data, and ensure every outreach sequence runs like clockwork. You won’t be cold calling or closing deals — you’ll be building the infrastructure that makes closing possible.





CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

Source and research prospects using 
, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, and company websites

Score and qualify leads against our Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) using documented criteria

Enrich contact records with company size, tech stack, key decision-maker details, and recent news

Maintain CRM hygiene in ClickUp — update statuses, log activities, tag leads by stage

Prepare pre-call research briefs for the Head of Sales before discovery calls

Monitor inbox replies to outbound sequences and classify response intent (interested, objection, OOO, bounce, not interested)

Track outbound sequence performance metrics (open rates, reply rates, meeting conversion)

Assist with drafting personalized
 sequences following approved templates and brand voice

Maintain and update sales playbook documentation as processes evolve

Flag high-intent signals (funding rounds, leadership changes, job postings) that indicate buying readiness





REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

2+ years in sales operations, lead generation, or SDR support role

Proficient with 
 or similar prospecting tools (ZoomInfo, Lusha, Hunter)

Experience with CRM systems (ClickUp, HubSpot, Salesforce, or Pipedrive)

Strong English written communication — you will draft research briefs and
 copy

High attention to detail and ability to follow documented SOPs consistently

Comfortable working US Eastern Time hours (minimum 4-hour overlap)

Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace





BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)

Experience in SaaS, digital marketing, or agency environments

Familiarity with LinkedIn Sales Navigator advanced search

Experience with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude) for research acceleration

Basic understanding of SEO, digital advertising, or e-commerce





COMPENSATION & DETAILS

Salary: USD $490.00–$740.00/month depending on experience

Type: Full-time (40 hours/week)

Schedule: Monday–Friday, flexible start with minimum 4-hour US ET overlap

Location: 100% Remote (Philippines-based)

Benefits: 13th-month pay, performance bonuses tied to pipeline metrics, clear growth path to Sales Operations Manager as we scale





HOW TO APPLY

Send your resume and a short Loom video (under 3 minutes) introducing yourself and walking through one example of a lead research project you completed. Bonus points if your Loom shows your actual screen and tools, not just a talking head.

Applications without a Loom video will not be reviewed.

title: DTC Video Editor for Footwear Brand (Meta Ads)
description:
We are Orthora — a DTC footwear brand built for 12-hour shifts.

Our customers are nurses and service workers dealing with foot, heel, knee, and back pain.



We are looking for a strong DTC video editor who understands how to turn pain, relief, and proof into converting video ads.



This role is not about fancy edits.

It is about performance, clarity, and conversion.



WHAT YOU WILL EDIT



Meta ads (UGC and direct response)

Short-form videos for Reels, TikTok, and Shorts

Product demos and comparisons

12-hour shift storytelling

Before and after pain-relief visuals



WHAT YOU MUST UNDERSTAND



How to visually communicate comfort and support

How to make shoes feel like relief on screen

How to edit for nurses and healthcare audiences

How to keep videos raw, real, and trustworthy

How to pace edits for conversions (fast hooks, clear captions)



No influencer-style fluff

No stock-footage feeling

No slow cinematic intros



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE



Proven DTC ad editing experience

Experience with footwear or medical / health products

Strong understanding of Meta ad creatives

UGC editing that feels real, not scripted

Good English comprehension for captions and pacing



Experience with orthopedic, pain-relief, or healthcare products is a strong bonus.



TOOLS



CapCut, Premiere Pro, or After Effects

Vertical video formats (9:16)

Clean captions and simple motion graphics



Experience with AI video tools is a strong plus, including:

VEO 3

Sora 2

Runway

Pika

Other AI-assisted video generation or enhancement tools



WORK AND PAY



40 hours per week

Long-term role

Paid test assignment





HOW TO APPLY



Send the following:

Your portfolio (DTC ads only)

Examples of footwear or medical / health-related edits

A short answer to this question:



Why do most DTC footwear ads fail, and how would you fix them?



Applications without relevant examples will be ignored.

title: Full-Charge Bookkeeper
description:

We are seeking a detail-oriented and highly organized Full-Charge Bookkeeper to join our bookkeeping firm. This role is responsible for maintaining accurate financial records for our clients. We focus on the media industry (marketing companies, podcasters, etc.). The ideal candidate is proactive, trustworthy, and comfortable handling all aspects of day-to-day accounting operations.

title: Virtual Assistant -  Appointment Setter
description:
We're a growing social media and lead generation agency looking for a sharp, driven Virtual Assistant to handle appointment setting. You'll be the first point of contact for warm leads - starting conversations, qualifying prospects, and booking calls for our sales team.



This is a remote, commission-heavy role with real earning potential for someone who's consistent and coachable.



What You'll Do

You'll engage prospects across messaging platforms,
, and follow-up sequences. You'll qualify leads based on our criteria and get them booked on the calendar. You'll keep our CRM and KPI tracker updated with clean, accurate records. You'll hit daily and weekly booking targets, and work closely with team leads to sharpen scripts and improve conversion rates.



What We're Looking For

We need someone with excellent English - written and spoken, near-native level. You should be a strong communicator who's organized, detail-oriented, and shows up consistently. A reliable internet connection and a proper home office setup are a must, and you need to be available during U.S. business hours.



Compensation - Earn Up to $1,750/Month

Base pay is $250/month, paid out $125 bi-weekly. On top of that, you earn $50 for every deal that closes. Hit milestones and you unlock bonuses: $100 at 5 closes, $200 at 10, $300 at 15, and $500 at 20. So at 5 closed deals you're at $600/month, at 10 you're at $950, at 15 you're at $1,300, and at 20 you're pulling in $1,750.



Payment is via Wise or PayPal.



Why This Role

You get to work from home, earn in USD, and be part of a team that actually invests in your growth. High performers get long-term opportunities. We're not looking for a temp, we're looking for someone who wants to build something with us.



How to Apply

Send us a short intro about yourself, your relevant experience, and why you'd be a strong fit. To show you read the full post, drop your favorite color in the first line of your application.



If you're self-motivated, hungry to learn, and ready to earn, we want to hear from you.

-driven edits.

title: Sales & Admin Agent Car Rental & Auto Repair Support**
description:
We are a Michigan-based car rental and auto repair company seeking a **highly reliable and detail-oriented virtual assistant** to handle customer inquiries, rental coordination, and problem resolution. You’ll work directly with customers who want to rent vehicles or are experiencing issues with their current rental.



This is a **full-time role (50 hours/week)**. You must be available to work **5 days per week, including Saturdays and Sundays**, with the ability to work as late as **10 PM Eastern Time**.



### Responsibilities:



* Respond promptly to inbound customer requests (calls, texts, and messages) regarding car rentals

* Troubleshoot rental issues (e.g., car won’t start, flat tire) and coordinate roadside assistance or towing

* Coordinate maintenance or repair needs with our auto repair team

* Schedule vehicles and update customer records

* Follow up with renters and maintain accurate communication logs



### Qualifications:



* Excellent spoken and written English

* Strong problem-solving and critical thinking skills

* Experience in customer service, preferably with cars, rentals, or logistics

* High-speed internet, noise-canceling headset, and a quiet workspace

* Tech-savvy and able to learn new tools quickly (e.g., CRM, text/call software, GPS tracking systems)



---



### **IMPORTANT – HOW TO APPLY:**



To show us you pay attention to detail and follow instructions, **please include the word “watermelon” in your subject line or response title**.



At the **very top** of your application, answer all of the following:



1. What time zone you’re located in

2. What your expected hourly rate is (in USD)

3. What days/hours you are available to work (please confirm weekend availability)

4. Send me a recording discussing your work history starting in 2018. Start with 2018 and discuss where you worked, what the company did, and what your role in the company was and then why you left, and then move forward in time.



**Applications without these details or the word “watermelon” will be ignored.**

title: Full-time Bilingual Intake Specialist / Closer
description:
We are a fast-growing US based law firm looking for a full-time bilingual (English/Spanish) intake specialist who knows how to follow up and close.



This is not a passive customer service role.



You will be speaking with people who have already reached out to us. Your job is to build trust, stay in touch, and help them hire us.



What You’ll Be Doing

Answer inbound calls from potential clients

Call and text leads who have already contacted us

Follow up multiple times until you get a response

Explain our services clearly and confidently

Send invoices and help guide clients to payment

Keep detailed notes in our system

Work closely with our team to move cases forward

What Makes This Role Different



Most intake roles stop after one or two follow-ups.



We don’t.



If someone reaches out to us, we believe they deserve a real chance to hire us.



That means:



consistent follow-up

thoughtful communication

not letting leads fall through the cracks



We are persistent—but always respectful.



Who This Is For



You are someone who:



Is fluent in English and Spanish

Is comfortable being on the phone most of the day

Is not afraid to follow up multiple times

Understands that most people don’t answer the first time

Can be warm and kind while still guiding the conversation

Likes helping people make decisions

Who This Is NOT For



This is not a good fit if you:



Only want to answer inbound calls

Feel uncomfortable following up more than once or twice

Prefer
 over phone conversations

Avoid asking for the sale

What Success Looks Like

Leads are contacted quickly

No lead is forgotten

Clients feel taken care of

More people choose to hire our firm

Compensation

Base: $1,000 – $1,200/month (based on experience)

Performance bonus available 



High performers can earn $2,000+/month



Our Culture



We are “nice people who help nice people.”



That means:



We treat clients with respect

We treat each other with respect

We do good work and take pride in it



We are not aggressive on the phone but we are consistent and professional.



How to Apply



Please include all of the following:



A resume/CV

A short voice note (in English and Spanish) introducing yourself

A brief description of your experience with phone-based work or sales

Your availability and internet setup

Your answer to this question:

     How many times should you follow up with a lead who has not responded, and why?

title: Salesforce Automation tester
description:
Job description:



Job Title: Automation Tester for Salesforce



Location: Philippines / Remote



Working Hours: Part-time, Permanent, Fully flexible anytime







About Application House:



Application House is a Salesforce consulting agency that operates three different business models consulting, product development and support.

We are truly reflecting the name House of the Application. We are developing a very advanced Application/Product that includes an Artificial Intelligence App including LLM hosted services, products like Uber, GCash, Grab, SMS/WhatsApp Messaging App, Fundraising & Payment App, etc.

Are you excited to join a brilliant, intelligent team? Then why wait? Go ahead and apply the role.





Role Overview



The Automation Tester will design, develop, and maintain automated test scripts for Application House’s Salesforce products using UTAM (UI Test Automation Model), Selenium WebDriver, and other automation test frameworks.

The tester will ensure end-to-end regression coverage for Lightning components, LWC-based UIs, and Salesforce UI, supporting CI/CD quality gates on the Salesforce platform.

This role involves working closely with developers, admins, and product managers to ensure that every release meets Application House’s high standards for reliability, performance, and user experience.





Key Responsibilities:



Design and develop automated UI tests using UTAM, Selenium, and other supported Salesforce automation frameworks.

Develop and maintain end-to-end regression suites for Salesforce managed packages (Lightning Web Components, Apex Controllers, Triggers, Flows).

Build data-driven test scripts for multiple Salesforce org environments (sandbox, UAT, production).

Integrate test execution within CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions / Bitbucket / Jenkins).

Collaborate with developers to identify automation candidates during sprint planning.

Maintain automation codebase, modular test models, and reusable components.

Log, track, and verify defects in Jira, working with developers for resolution.

Support cross-browser and device testing (Chrome, Edge, Firefox).

Ensure positive/negative test coverage for Lightning Record Pages and Salesforce UI.

Prepare test documentation: automation scripts, test data setup, test reports, and coverage metrics.

Contribute to manual-to-automation transition, reducing regression testing effort.

Stay current with Salesforce test automation tools, particularly UTAM, Provar, and Salesforce Testing Frameworks.





Required Skills & Experience



2–3 years of experience in software testing, including automation testing.

Hands-on with UTAM, Selenium, WebDriverIO, or Provar.

Good understanding of Salesforce data model, custom objects, triggers, flows, and Lightning pages.

Strong knowledge of JavaScript or Java for automation scripting.

Familiarity with CI/CD and version control tools (Git, Jenkins, Bitbucket).

Proficient in using Test Management tools (Jira, TestRail).

Excellent analytical, debugging, and problem-solving skills.

Ability to work collaboratively in Agile/Scrum environments.





Preferred Qualifications:



Salesforce Certified Administrator or Platform App Builder (advantageous).

Experience testing Salesforce projects.

Knowledge of Salesforce DX, Scratch Orgs, and Packaging Automation.

Familiarity with Salesforce UTAM Page Object Model and JSON-based configuration.

Understanding of Salesforce Lightning Design System (SLDS) and UI selectors.





Tools & Technologies:



UTAM Framework (Salesforce official UI automation tool)

Selenium / WebDriver / WebDriverIO

Git / Jenkins / Bitbucket

Jira / TestRail / Confluence

Visual Studio Code with Salesforce CLI





Why Join Application House:



Work on real Salesforce AppExchange products used by global customers.

Exposure to Salesforce UTAM-based automation — one of the newest automation standards in the Salesforce ecosystem.

Collaborative global team (UK, India, Philippines) with continuous learning opportunities.

Competitive salary, flexible work hours, and performance bonuses.

Opportunity to grow into QA Lead or Salesforce Test Automation Architect roles.

 for communication

title: Quality Control Assistant for Real Estate Media
description:
Part-Time Quality Control Assistant for Real Estate Media Company



We are looking for a sharp, detail-oriented Quality Control Assistant to be the final layer between our editing team and our clients. Your role is to make sure every gallery is clean, organized, polished, and ready for delivery.



About Us

We are not just looking for a Virtual Assistant to fill a role - we are looking for a long-term tea
mber.

- Willing to learn and grow

Bonus Skills

Video editing experience is a plus, but not necessary (we will provide training). There is room to grow into simple real estate walkthrough video editing.



Hiring Process

This posting is for an audition. We will select 3–5 candidates for a paid test project, then choose who to bring onto the team.



Compensation

Compensation is negotiable based on experience, reliability, and overall fit.

To Apply

- Your experience with Lightroom and/or quality control

Thank you for your time,

Neo

title: Interior Design Photographer
description:
Looking for a photo editor to help me grow my interior design/ lighting design photography business. I mainly work as a lighting designer and I photograph my own projects and a selection of other projects from my network (also lighting design projects) 



Therefore I need help with the editing process so I can focus on shooting. 



I mainly use lightroom and sometimes photoshop for more complex lighting editing/removal of objects 



The typical workflow is as follows: 



- Culling

- Stacking and creating HDR (I use 3 bracketed shots)

- Fixing up the geometry (key, needs to be done ‘manually’ with the guides rather than with the ‘auto’ alignments in lightroom since it never gets it right’

- Basic correction  : White Balance, Exposure, Contrast, etc

- Color Cast Removal: keep Neutral White walls while maintaining the warm Glow of the lights.

- Other corrections sometimes needed: cromatic aberration. Somethings i need to do this manually to avoid green/purple lights

- Deletion of unwanted objects/elements: building services (speakers, sprinklers, emergency and exit lights including the green cast of the emergency lights), signage, labels, etc. Unwanted people (when not intentionally on the photo)

- Creation of photoproofs in lightroom- very easy task with my template

- Exports in both hi-res and low-res JPEGS

- 



- I’ll send you 8 photos (RAW files) for you to edit following the workflow described above. (Merging 3 exposures, creating HDR, colour correction, etc)

- You will deliver 8 ready high res JPEGs

-Estimated time for this task is 1 hour 



I am looking for a long-term partner for 2-3 shoots per month (40-80 photos each). While the initial test is for $2 hours, I am looking for a consistent workflow and am happy to discuss per-project rates as our volume grows.

title: Operations & Growth Coordinator — US Performance Marketing Agency
description:
ABOUT US



We’re a boutique performance marketing agency based in the US. We manage paid media (Meta Ads, Google Ads) for DTC ecommerce brands and private equity portfolio companies in the $5M–$250M revenue range. Our team has managed over $600M in total ad spend.

We are a small, senior team not a big agency with layers of junior people. Everyone here is excellent at what they do. We’re looking for one exceptional person to become the operational backbone of the firm and grow with us long-term.



THE ROLE



This is a hybrid role. You’ll be part operations manager, part executive assistant, part SDR (sales development rep), and part project coordinator. You won’t specialize in just one thing you’ll own the daily engine that keeps the entire business running.

If you’re the kind of person who thrives on having 10 different responsibilities, loves checking things off, and gets satisfaction from making sure nothing falls through the cracks this role was designed for you.

You’ll work directly with the founder. There’s no middle management layer between us.



WHAT A TYPICAL DAY LOOKS LIKE



Morning (EST overlap hours):

Check HubSpot CRM: update deal stages from yesterday’s activity, flag any deals going stale, note which prospects need follow-up today

Pull daily performance data from reporting dashboards (Northbeam, Google Sheets) and update client-facing templates

Review Monday.com boards: check freelancer delivery status, update task statuses, flag anything overdue

Send daily Slack summary to the team: what’s due, what’s done, what needs attention



Midday:

Outbound prospecting: research 5–10 new prospects using our ICP criteria, enrich their data, add to HubSpot with notes

Draft follow-up
s for warm leads and stale deals founder reviews and sends from Gmail

Process meeting transcripts: extract action items, create tasks in Monday.com, send follow-up summaries

Coordinate with freelancers: check on creative deliverables, confirm timelines, relay feedback



Afternoon:

Content: draft LinkedIn posts, social media updates, or
 copy for our brand using AI tools to assist, then you polish and queue

Light web updates: make edits to our company landing pages (WordPress or basic HTML/CSS), update case studies, keep the website current

Invoicing, payment tracking, calendar management, and other admin as needed

End-of-day Slack update: what you completed, what’s blocked, what’s planned for tomorrow



REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

2+ years working remotely for a US-based company you understand US business hours, communication norms, and async work culture

HubSpot CRM experience deal pipelines, contact management, saved views, activity logging. This is your primary tool.

Advanced Google Sheets IMPORTRANGE, pivot tables, data cleanup, building summary dashboards from raw data

Monday.com or similar PM tool board management, automations, status tracking across multiple projects and team members

Strong written English you’ll draft outreach
s, LinkedIn content, client-facing summaries, and internal reports. Grammar, tone, and professionalism matter.

Outbound/SDR experience you’ve done prospect research, list building, lead enrichment, and/or cold
 drafting before. You know what a good outreach message looks like.

Proactive and self-directed you don’t wait to be told what to do. You check the queue, you flag problems, you send the EOD update without being asked. This is the single most important trait.



BONUS POINTS (NOT REQUIRED, BUT WILL SET YOU APART)

Experience at a digital marketing agency, media buying shop, or ecommerce company

Familiarity with Northbeam, Triple Whale, GA4, or similar analytics/attribution platforms

Apollo.io, Store Leads, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, or similar prospecting tools

Understanding of DTC ecommerce metrics: ROAS, CPA, MER, CAC, AOV, LTV you don’t optimize them, but you know what they mean

n8n, Zapier, or Make.com automation experience

Basic WordPress or HTML/CSS (enough to update landing pages, not build from scratch)

Shopify admin familiarity (product edits, order lookup)

Comfort using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude) as a daily work accelerator we’re an AI-forward team



TOOLS YOU’LL USE

HubSpot CRM  •  Monday.com  •  Google Workspace (Sheets, Docs, Gmail)  •  Slack  •  Northbeam  •  Granola (meeting transcripts)  •  Claude AI  •  Loom  •  WordPress  •  Shopify (occasionally)



COMPENSATION & DETAILS

Salary: $800–$1,000/month depending on experience. Negotiable for exceptional candidates.

Schedule: Full-time, 40 hours/week. Must overlap with US Eastern Time mornings: 8AM–12PM EST minimum (8PM–5AM Manila time). Remaining hours are flexible.

13th month bonus paid in December.

Quarterly performance bonuses ($100–$200) tied to pipeline accuracy, reporting timeliness, and outbound activity.

Annual salary increases for strong performers.

Long-term position. We are building a team, not filling a temp slot. We want someone who stays for years.



HOW TO APPLY



In your message, answer these four questions:



Tell me about your most recent remote role. What company, what did you do day-to-day, and why did you leave (or why are you looking)?

What’s your HubSpot experience? Be specific which features have you used, how many contacts/deals were you managing, what did your CRM workflow look like?

Have you done any outbound prospecting or SDR work? Describe the process: what tools, how you found leads, what your outreach looked like, what results you got.

Describe a time you caught a problem before anyone else noticed. What was it, how did you find it, and what did you do?



Applications that don’t answer all four questions or use a generic cover letter will not be reviewed.

We respond to every qualified applicant within 48 hours.

title: Remote Ophthalmologist
description:
Remote Ophthalmologist to complete charts. Job Title: Remote Optometrist



Job Summary:

We are seeking a dedicated and licensed Remote Ophthalmologist to provide virtual eye care services to patients across various locations. The role involves performing comprehensive eye exams, diagnosing vision problems, and offering advice on eyewear, contact lenses, and general eye health—all through telemedicine.



Key Responsibilities:



Conduct Virtual Eye Exams: Use telemedicine platforms to assess patients' eye health, gather medical history, and perform vision tests.



Diagnose and Treat Eye Conditions: Identify common vision issues such as nearsightedness, farsightedness, astigmatism, and presbyopia, and provide solutions.



Prescribe Eyewear & Contact Lenses: Based on exam results, issue prescriptions for glasses or contact lenses.



Monitor Patient Progress: Follow up with patients, track their vision health, and adjust prescriptions when necessary.



Provide Advice on Eye Care: Offer guidance on maintaining eye health, managing digital eye strain, and preventing common eye diseases.



Patient Education: Educate patients on how to use their prescribed eyewear properly, the importance of regular eye exams, and how to take care of their vision.



Document Patient Information: Keep accurate records of consultations, prescriptions, and any recommendations made for future care.



Collaborate with Other Healthcare Providers: Work closely with general healthcare providers and ophthalmologists when necessary for complex cases.



Required Qualifications:



MD degree from an accredited Medical school.



State license to practice as an Ophthalmologist (for U.S.-based positions; other country licenses may be required depending on location).



Proven experience in providing eye exams and diagnosing visual impairments.



Comfortable with using telemedicine platforms for virtual consultations.



Excellent communication skills, with the ability to explain eye care concepts clearly and concisely.



Proficient in using optical diagnostic tools (e.g., autorefractor, slit lamp, etc.), even in a remote setting.



Preferred Qualifications:



Experience with remote or telehealth services.



Knowledge of eye health trends and the latest in virtual care technologies.



Familiarity with prescribing digital solutions for common eye strain or other digital-related visual issues.



Work Environment:



This is a remote position, so candidates must have access to high-speed internet and a quiet, professional workspace.



Must be available for consultations during business hours or as required.



Benefits:



Competitive salary with performance-based bonuses.



Flexible working hours.



Continuing education and training in telemedicine and remote eye care.

title: Video Editor — AI-Powered Ad Creative (E-Commerce)
description:
ABOUT US

Korvanis is a direct-to-consumer health & wellness e-commerce brand selling therapeutic home devices in Czech Republic and Slovakia. We help people with chronic back pain through innovative products advertised on Meta 
/Instagram).



THE ROLE

We're looking for a full-time video editor to create high-converting video ads from AI-generated assets. You are NOT shooting footage — you're combining AI-generated clips, voiceovers and images into polished ad creatives.



WHAT YOU'LL DO EVERY DAY

- Edit 2-3 polished VSL-style video ads per day (2-5 minutes each) with AI voiceover, subtitles, transitions, and sound effects

- Add clean, synced subtitles/captions to all videos

- Handle sound design: music selection, SFX layering, audio leveling, pacing

- Follow creative briefs with competitor reference videos and scripts provided in English

- Translation to Czech/Slovak is handled by AI tools — no language skills needed



TOOLS WE PROVIDE (No Cost to You)

- Claude AI (scripting, translation, creative support)

- ElevenLabs (AI voiceover)

- Kie.ai API (AI image/video generation)

- CapCut Pro

- Heygen (AI avatar/video)

- Full creative briefs with competitor references



REQUIREMENTS

- Strong video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar)

- Sound design experience: music, SFX, audio leveling, pacing

- Clean subtitle/caption creation synced to voiceover

- Comfortable working with AI-generated assets (we train you on our workflow)

- Eye for direct-response ad pacing — you understand the first 3 seconds matter most

- Hardware: minimum 16GB RAM, stable internet, CapCut desktop capable

- Self-motivated, async worker — deliverables due by 6:00 PM CET daily



NICE TO HAVE

- Experience editing ads for Meta/TikTok/YouTube

- Familiarity with AI video tools (Kling, Runway, Pika, Heygen)

- Understanding of direct-response marketing (hooks, CTAs, urgency)

- Health/wellness or e-commerce experience



COMPENSATION

- $400/month paid biweekly ($200 every 2 weeks)

- Performance bonus: $40-50 per winning ad ($1,000+ spend over 14 days with 2.5+ ROAS)

- Top editors realistically earn 2-4 bonuses/month on top of base

- 3-day paid trial period



HOW WE WORK

- Fully asynchronous communication

- You receive: script in English + competitor reference + creative direction

- You deliver, we give feedback, you iterate

- Quick calls when both online, no fixed meeting schedule



HOW TO APPLY — READ CAREFULLY

Applications missing any of these will NOT be reviewed:



1. Your portfolio or showreel — 3 to 5 of your best edited videos (ads preferred)

2. A short Loom or video message (1-2 min) introducing yourself, your experience, and your editing setup

3. Answer this question in your message: "What makes the first 3 seconds of a video ad effective?"



Top candidates will receive a short PAID test: edit a 2-3 minutes video

title: AI Voice Developer - Production-Ready Voice Agents & SMS Automation
description:
We're ToneHaus, an AI voice agency building custom voice AI systems for trades and SMBs. We're looking for a production-ready AI voice developer to build out 2 voice AI systems and 1 SMS automation agent starting Monday.



This is not entry-level. We need someone with proven experience shipping production voice agents, not proof of concepts or tutorials.



THE PROJECT

Phase 1 (Weeks 2-3):



- Build 2 custom voice AI agents (inbound call handling, lead qualification, appointment booking)

- Build 1 SMS automation system (lead follow-up, confirmations, notifications)

- Integration with existing CRM/booking platforms (Payaca, BigChange and ServiceM8)

- Testing and refinement



Phase 2 (Ongoing):

If Phase 1 goes well, we have a consistent pipeline of client projects through our agency. This could be 20-40 hours/week of ongoing work with long-term stability.



WE NEED

? Proven experience building production voice AI agents (not tutorials, not demos)

? Evidence of work: active phone number from a past client, backend system walkthrough, case study, or similar

? Experience with voice/telephony platforms (11Labs, Retell AI, Twilio, etc.)

? Understanding of LLMs and prompt engineering

? Experience with n8n or similar automation platforms

? Ability to integrate with CRM/booking systems (Calendly, HubSpot, Airtable, etc.)

? Reliable communication and organised workflow



WHAT WE'LL ASK IN YOUR APPLICATION

Before applying, be prepared to answer:



Your Voice AI Experience: Walk us through a production system you built. What was the business problem? What tools did you use? What were the results?



Your Evidence: Provide one of the following:



An active phone number from a past client's business (we'll call it to test)

A backend system walkthrough (Loom video or call) showing your architecture

A detailed case study with metrics

Links to deployed systems you've built



Your Building Process: 



- How do you approach building a new voice AI system? Walk us through your workflow from requirements to deployment.



- Testing & Quality Assurance: How do you test voice agents? What does your QA process look like? How do you catch edge cases?



- Your Tech Stack: What LLMs do you use? (Claude, GPT-4, etc.) What voice platforms? What do you use for automation and integration? Why those choices?



- Communication & Organisation: How do you communicate progress? What tools do you use to stay organised? How do you handle revisions and feedback?



- Your Experience: Years building voice AI? What types of businesses have you worked with? What's the most complex system you've built?





WHY THIS MATTERS

We work with real businesses: plumbers, HVAC contractors, med spas, roofing companies. Their customers are calling expecting a real experience. We need someone who:



- Ships production-quality code

- Tests thoroughly

- Thinks about edge cases and user experience

- Communicates clearly and promptly

- Can scale with us



WHAT'S NEXT?



If you have solid production experience and real evidence of work, apply with:



- A brief intro

- Answers to the 7 questions above

- Your evidence (link, phone number, or Loom video)



We'll review applications and start conversations with people who meet the requirements.

title: Remaker – Graphic Designer & Proofing & Print Specialist
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a highly detail-oriented and technically skilled Remaker to support our promotional and customizable product operations. The ideal candidate will be responsible for recreating, correcting, and adjusting artwork files to ensure they meet all technical printing requirements before final approval and production.

This role is essential in maintaining production accuracy and preventing costly errors. The Remaker acts as a critical link between the design, sales, and production teams, ensuring every file is production-ready, technically compliant, and visually consistent with the client’s brand.



Key Responsibilities

Recreate and modify artwork files according to client requests and internal specifications

Correct artwork errors related to layout, alignment, scale, color mode, bleed, and resolution

Ensure all files meet strict printing and production standards before finalization

Work extensively with product templates across various customizable merchandise

Maintain brand consistency and visual accuracy in all remade files

Review and verify technical specifications to prevent production delays or reprints

Manage multiple remake requests simultaneously while meeting tight deadlines

Collaborate closely with proofing, design, sales, and production teams to streamline workflow



Work Schedule

6 working days per week

1 rest day (Saturday or Sunday CDT)

24/7 operation

Fixed 8-hour shifts

Schedule may vary based on operational needs



Requirements

Strong knowledge of graphic design principles and print production workflows

Advanced proficiency in Adobe Illustrator and Adobe Photoshop

Proven experience working with product templates and detailed technical specifications

Exceptional attention to detail and accuracy

Ability to work efficiently in a fast-paced, high-volume environment

Strong time management skills and ability to meet demanding deadlines

Clear and professional communication skills



Nice to Have (Optional)

Familiarity with specific printing processes (e.g., screen printing, digital printing, embroidery, heat transfer)

Experience in promotional products or customizable merchandise industry

title: PAID MEDIA SPECIALIST (Google Ads + Meta Ads)
description:
PAID MEDIA SPECIALIST (Google Ads + Meta Ads)

Company: Graystone Consulting (US-based fractional CMO practice)

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Hours: 25-30 hours/week, flexible schedule with some US Eastern overlap

Type: Long-term contractor



About Us



Graystone Consulting is a fractional CMO and growth operations firm based in Lexington, Kentucky. We work with B2B SaaS companies and hospitality brands in the $3M to $50M revenue range. You would report directly to our Founder and work across multiple client accounts managing paid media execution.



What You Will Do

You will own day-to-day execution of Google Ads and Meta Ads across 2-3 client accounts:



1. Build, launch, and optimize Google Ads campaigns (Search, Performance Max, Shopping, Display)

2. Build, launch, and optimize Meta Ads campaigns (prospecting, retargeting, lookalike audiences)

3. Manage combined monthly ad spend of $30K+ across accounts

4. Set up and validate conversion tracking (Google Tag Manager, GA4, Meta CAPI/Pixel)

5. Conduct daily bid adjustments, search term reviews, and budget pacing

6. Refresh ad creative (text overlays, asset group updates) and flag fatigue

7. Build weekly performance reports in Google Sheets with actionable recommendations

8. Coordinate with agency partners on creative asset delivery

9. Support new client onboarding by auditing existing ad accounts and building campaign structures from scratch



Current Client Context



Client 1: National fast-casual restaurant brand, PMax + Meta, multi-location targeting across NYC, Boston, Philadelphia

Client 2: B2B SaaS company, Google Search + Meta retargeting launch



Future clients onboarded through our Growth Operating System methodology (you would build their paid media infrastructure)



Required Skills



- 3+ years hands-on Google Ads management (Search, PMax, Shopping required)

- 2+ years hands-on Meta Ads management (prospecting + retargeting structures)

- Google Tag Manager setup and troubleshooting

- GA4 configuration and conversion tracking validation

- Google Sheets reporting (pivot tables, VLOOKUP, dashboard building)

- Experience managing $10K+/mo in combined ad spend

- Written English fluency for reporting and async communication



Strongly Preferred



- Google Ads certification (Search, Display, or Shopping)

- Experience with restaurant, hospitality, or multi-location businesses

- Experience with B2B SaaS lead generation campaigns

- Familiarity with ClickUp or similar project management tools

- Meta Conversions API (CAPI) implementation experience



Tools You Will Use

Google Ads, Meta Ads Manager, Google Tag Manager, GA4, Google Sheets, ClickUp, Slack



How to Apply

Send a message with:



1. A brief description of the largest Google Ads account you have managed (monthly budget and campaign types)

2. A specific example of a campaign you optimized and the result (ROAS improvement, CPA reduction, etc.)

3. Your available hours per week and preferred working hours

4. Your hourly rate in USD

title: Sales Dialer
description:
TL;DR

Role: Sales Caller (Dialer)

Pay: $1,200 USD Guaranteed Base. With bonuses, you can earn over $2,000 USD.

Schedule: You must work from 6:00 AM to 3:00 PM GMT+8 EVERY DAY but weekends we have lesser traffic.

Client Revenue: The business makes $270,000 USD per month.

Job: You call 100+ people a day. You are fast. You are diligent.

Tracking: We do not screenshot your computer. We only care about your results.

Requirement: You must send a voice note or video to apply.



Job Title: High-Volume Sales Caller



What Is This Job? (Read This First)

We are an education company. We sell a program that teaches people how to start online businesses. The program costs $5,000.



Our company makes $270,000 USD every month. We have too many people asking for help and not enough people to call them.



We need a "Dialer." Your job is to call these people on the phone. You are the engine. You call them fast. You make sure they are real. You help them buy our small $7 course if they cannot afford the big one.



Who You Are



Experience: You do not need experience in this specific industry. You just need a proven history of being diligent (hard-working).



Fast & Punctual: You are always on time. You move fast.



Open To Learn: You listen to feedback and get better every day.



Tech: You have fast internet and a quiet room.



The Work Culture

We do not treat you like a baby.



We do not track your hours.



We do not record your screen.



All we care about is: How fast did you call? and What happened on the call?



The Schedule



Time: 6:00 AM to 3:00 PM GMT+8.



This is non-negotiable. This is when our customers pick up the phone.



What You Will Do (The Daily Work)



Call Fast: When a new person signs up, you call them in 5 minutes.



Call A Lot: You will dial the phone 100 to 300 times a day. Most calls are short.



Sell The Small Stuff: If someone cannot afford $5,000, you sell them our $7 course. You do not let them leave with nothing.



Check In: You call students on Day 3 and Day 6 of their course to see if they are doing the work.



The Rules (No Excuses)



Speed Rule: You call new leads in 5 minutes. We track this automatically.



Note Rule: You write a note in the computer (CRM) for every call. If you don't write it, you don't get paid.



The Money



Base Pay: $1,200 USD per month. This is guaranteed if you do the work.



Bonuses: We have many bonuses for hitting targets. Your pay can easily stack up to $2,000 USD.



How To Apply (Mandatory)

Do not just send a CV. We will ignore it.



Record a Loom video OR a Voice Note (in Messenger).



Answer this specific question: "Tell me why you can be diligent and dependable, and cite an example of when you were diligent and dependable in the past."



Send the video/audio with your application.



If you do not send the recording, you will not get the job.

title: AI-Powered Copywriter & Creative Strategist (Claude + Gemini Expert)

title: Executive Assistant with >5 years experience
description:
Role Overview

We are seeking a highly organized, tech-savvy, and detail-oriented Executive Assistant to support a global founder and investor. This is a dual-focus role: you will manage a complex professional calendar and investment-related administration while simultaneously acting as a luxury travel curator and lifestyle manager.



The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced, international environment and has a "zero-fail" mentality regarding scheduling and logistics.



Key Responsibilities

1. Bespoke Travel & Experience Design



End-to-End Planning: Research, plan, and book high-end international trips (adventure, luxury, and cultural immersion).



Bespoke Itineraries: Create detailed "high-quality" travel decks or Notion pages including restaurant reservations, local transport, and "off-the-beaten-path" experiences.



Logistics Management: Handle visa requirements, flight bookings (Emirates/Star Alliance), and hotel coordination (Marriott Bonvoy/Boutique).



2. Calendar & Workflow Management



Gatekeeping: Manage a complex, multi-timezone calendar, prioritizing high-value business meetings and investment calls.



Process Optimization: Maintain and build Notion databases to track investments, real estate portfolios, and project statuses.



In-Box Triage: Monitor communications to ensure urgent matters are surfaced and routine tasks are handled autonomously.



3. Project & Lifestyle Support



Data Management: Create and maintain Notion tables for lifestyle optimization (e.g., longevity protocols, workout schedules, or collection management).



Research: Conduct deep-dive research into new business ventures, "good-for-you" consumer products, or real estate opportunities.



Personal Admin: Coordinate with private chefs, household staff, or local service providers across multiple residences (UAE, Europe, US).



Requirements

Experience: 5+ years as an EA for professional individuals or founders.



Excel and/or Notion Advanced User: Ability to build relational databases, formulas, and aesthetically clean dashboards.



Travel Expertise: Deep knowledge of luxury travel landscapes and the ability to find "elevated" dining and hospitality experiences.



Communication: Fluent, high-level English (written and verbal). Ability to draft professional correspondence and interact with high-level stakeholders.



Mindset: Proactive, autonomous, and comfortable with ambiguity. You don't just find problems; you bring three solutions.



Technical Stack

Workspace: Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Drive). Microsoft (Outlook). 



Organization: Notion (Advanced level).



Communication: WhatsApp.



Compensation & Benefits

Competitive monthly retainer (experience-dependent). $900-$1100 for full-time. $500-$600 for part-time. 



Flexible, 100% remote working environment.



Opportunity to work within a high-growth investment and entrepreneurial ecosystem.



How to Apply:

). This minimizes unconscious bias in our hiring process. Successful candidates will be invited to a job interview.



Ready to join our team? Start by clicking the link below.

title: Digital PR and Community Specialist - Reddit, Quora, etc.
description:
We are looking for a strategic communicator to own the digital footprint for 
 across high-value professional communities and executive networks such as but not limited to LinkedIn, Reddit and Quora. Your goal is simple ensure that whenever a founder, investor, or tech leader is discussing high-value digital assets, 
 is the first and most trusted name mentioned.



This role is about Influence and Reputation. You will act as the Voice of the Brand on the open web, building trust through expert-level dialogue and strategic placements.



Core Responsibilities

Executive Voice Management LinkedIn Partner with our senior brokers to translate their market insights into high-impact content. You will manage the posting rhythm and drive engagement with target accounts, specifically VC-backed founders and C-suite leaders.



Expert Engagement Reddit and Quora Actively monitor and participate in high-level discussions regarding startup naming, brand protection, and digital asset acquisitions. You will provide deep, value-first answers that position 
 as the definitive authority.



Strategic Citations Identify and secure organic brand mentions and Source of Truth features on high-authority tech platforms, newsletters, and industry wikis.



Media and Podcast Outreach Identify and pitch the 
 leadership team to top-tier tech and business podcasts. You will craft personalized, data-backed pitches that secure guest spots.



AI Recommendation Influence Monitor how AI-driven research tools describe the brokerage landscape. You will identify gaps and create the high-quality source material these engines need to recommend 
.



What We Are Looking For



Professional Native You understand the nuances of professional communities. You know how to provide genuine value in a discussion without sounding like an advertisement.



Premium Writing Style You write for the 1 percent. Your copy is clean, authoritative, and direct. You avoid marketing fluff and focus on data and results.



High-Velocity Execution You thrive in a fast-paced environment. You are comfortable managing a high volume of outreach and daily engagement targets.



Editorial Eye You use modern tools to scale your research and drafting, but you have the manual skill to ensure every final output is indistinguishable from a seasoned industry expert.



Requirements

Proven track record of growing professional brand authority in the B2B tech or financial sectors.

Experience in Digital PR, Brand Evangelism, or High-End Content Strategy.

A deep understanding of the startup ecosystem and how founders make high-stakes branding decisions.

The ability to iterate daily based on what is driving the most high-value inquiries.



How to Apply

Submit your resume and a link to your portfolio.

title: YouTube Video Editor — Fitness / Personal Brand (Long-Term)
description:
We're looking for a skilled video editor to join our team on an ongoing basis, editing weekly YouTube content for a male personal brand in the online fitness coaching space. Our audience is women 30–45+ so the content needs to feel polished, warm, and credible — not hype-heavy.



THE WORK:



• 4 videos per month to start, with potential to scale

• Videos are 10–15 minutes long

• Filmed on green screen — background replacement and compositing is a core part of the role

• Motion graphics using Re-Motion are a significant part of the editing workflow — you must be comfortable with this

• AI tools are an expected part of how you work — we want editors who use AI to improve efficiency and quality, not avoid it

• Style: clean, engaging, professional fitness/wellness content



TURNAROUND EXPECTATIONS:



• Raw footage for all 4 videos delivered in one batch, once per month

• We publish every Tuesday — we need each completed video back by the Friday before

• That gives us the weekend to review, prepare, and schedule

• At least 1 video delivered per week

• Payment is per completed video



WHAT WE PROVIDE:



• Raw footage

• Full script to guide your edit and pacing

• Brand guide (colours, fonts, logos)

• B-roll library — women's training footage, client photos, and training environment content



WHAT YOU'LL BE EDITING:



• 

• 

• 

• 



YOU MUST HAVE:



• A portfolio of YouTube video editing work (required — no portfolio, no consideration)

• Strong green screen keying — clean and professional, no halos or fringing

• Proficiency in DaVinci Resolve for editing and colour grading

• Solid experience with Re-Motion for motion graphics

• Experience using AI tools such as Descript, Runway, or similar



NICE TO HAVE:



• Previous work in fitness, health, or wellness

• Experience editing long-form personal brand content



ENGAGEMENT:



• Starting on a per-video rate

• Opportunity to move to a monthly retainer as the relationship grows

• Immediate start preferred

• Long-term role for the right person



TO APPLY:

Please include your portfolio or 2–3 relevant video examples. Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
We are hiring a new Social Media Strategist for our Agency and you will help us to create viral Reels and manage the accounts of our clients to grow them to higher numbers and scale our agency. We 4x our revenue last month and with this foundation we want to scale even higher now, so we need an experienced Social Media Marketing Strategist to maintain the quality for our clients. If you already have experience with Social Media (Short Form Content on Instagram Reels), you are creative, know how to create video concepts that go viral and how to analyse viral videos, this job is perfect for you.



Why you should work with us:



- You start with established personal brands - The client(s) you will work with, have proven concepts, so you can build on a solid foundation and use the style of their existing videos to develop even better concepts.

- AI Implementation - AI is becoming more and more relevant and we are already using AI for many different areas, especially for content (picture/video) creation, so you are up to date with AI for social media while other companies don’t use AI at all. So you are 3 steps ahead.

- Different projects - Step by step you will work with different accounts / clients so you can be creative in different areas.

- Long Term partnership - We are only looking for long term employees, so you will work with us for a long time and have a stable income with a growing agency.

- Established Agency - Our agency is active since 2022, so we gained a lot of experience in all fields of social media, so you will learn from our experience which will help you to improve your social media skills.

- Clear guides and onboarding - You will clear instructions on how to do you work in a detailed onboarding and training. Combined with your own knowledge we will make sure to have the best results.



Your specific task:



You have 3 daily main tasks to focus on, besides that you will get more different tasks over the time when we see that you’re doing a great job:



1. Market Research - You go through the market and find viral Reels / Trends from other creators that have potential to go viral for our clients

2. Concept Creation - Based on your research you create the specific video concepts that our content team / clients should create.

3. Analyse our videos - Not only looking for new concepts is important but also analysing our own accounts and videos, finding winning patterns and implementing these information in the concept creation.



Other potential tasks in the future that give you more responsibility:



- Team Management - We have a big team for reposting content, where we need support with employee onboarding, technical setups and video creation

- More clients - Depending on your workload you will work with more of our clients and help with more different concepts

- Implementing complete new ideas - Your main task is to improve our current system but we always have new ideas, new concepts and new strategies that we need to implement and test with our existing systems.



What we expect and need from you:



- Experience with Social Media / Short Form video creation. Not only uploading simple posts for companies but actual experience and skills in video conception for content that goes viral and analysing viral videos.

- Experience in the Online Marketing Space. This is not a beginner job and you should know how social media is used in the business world.

- 7 Days / week. This is a well paid job, so we are looking for a high performing employee.

- Fluent English (speaking & writing) since our clients are mainly from USA.



Salary and Perspective:



Since we are looking for the best employee for this job, we start with a salary of $800 per month. In the future there is a chance for more if you do a good job and you help us to reach our company goals. Depending on your skills and results you can get more responsibility and more projects.



If you’re looking for a long term job, then message me here with the code word “smms” in your application :)

title: Shopify Store Manager for Product Research, Listings & Store Operations
description:

* Good English communication skills

* Detail-oriented and accurate

* Able to work independently without constant supervision

Nice to Have

To Apply

title: One-Time Shopify SEO Fix + AI Search Optimization (ChatGPT Shopping) | Measurable Results
description:
About the Job



I’m looking for someone to do a complete SEO overhaul one time and set my store up so it’s structured correctly, ranks better than competitors, and is also optimized for AI-driven shopping discovery (people using ChatGPT/AI tools to find what to buy).



After the project is complete, I’ll only need a few check-ins per year for updates and additional optimizations.



The Goal



Fix the foundation so SEO growth is consistent



Beat competitors on the most important keywords



Improve visibility for Google search + “ChatGPT shopping” style searches



Show measurable improvement (rankings, clicks, indexing, traffic trend)



What You’ll Do (Project Scope)



Phase 1: Audit + Plan



Technical SEO audit (crawl issues, indexing, speed, duplicates, broken links, redirects)



Competitor analysis (top competitors + what they rank for that we don’t)



Keyword map (priority keywords ? correct collection/product pages)



Quick wins list + full fix plan



Phase 2: Implementation



Fix on-page SEO on key pages (collections + top products)



Titles, meta descriptions, H1/H2 structure, copy improvements



Improve internal linking (collections ? sub-collections ? products ? guides)



Add/clean structured data (Product / FAQ / Breadcrumb schema)



Fix duplicate content problems (collections, filters, tag pages, variants)



Core Web Vitals / speed improvements (what you can do directly + list of required dev changes if needed)



Setup tracking correctly (GSC, GA4) if anything is missing



Phase 3: AI Search Optimization (ChatGPT / AI Discovery)



Create/optimize pages so AI tools can understand and recommend us:



Clear product specs, compatibility, and common questions



Buyer-intent FAQs, comparisons, “best for” sections



Trust pages that help credibility (shipping, returns, warranty, about, contact)



Standardize product naming + data consistency (so AI doesn’t misread it)



Phase 4: Handoff + Reporting



Baseline report (before)



Post-implementation report (after)



Rank tracker setup for priority keywords (so I can keep watching it)



Simple SOP so my team can update new products without messing up SEO



90-day follow-up checklist



What “Done” Looks Like



You deliver:



Fixed SEO foundation + documented changes



Keyword map + optimized core pages



Schema working correctly



Clean internal linking structure



Tracking + rank monitoring setup



A clear “what to do when we add products” guide



Optional Add-On (I’ll use this a few times per year)



Quarterly or seasonal SEO refresh (2–4 times per year)



Re-audit, re-optimize, update keyword map, check rankings, fix new issues



Requirements



Proven Shopify SEO results (must show examples)



Comfortable making changes directly in Shopify (or giving exact step-by-step instructions)



No spam backlinks, no shady tactics



To Apply (Must Answer)



Send 2–3 examples of Shopify sites you improved + results screenshots (GSC/GA4/rankings).



What’s your process for a one-time SEO overhaul?



How do you optimize for AI search / ChatGPT shopping discovery?



What deliverables do you provide at the end?



Your fixed price + timeline + what’s included.



Red Flags (Don’t Apply)



You can’t show results



You sell backlinks packages



You avoid tracking or reporting
salary: 3 to 5 USD pr hour depending on experien

title: Video Editor who #Believes in Entrepreneurs| Flexible Work Schedule
description:
We're trying to solve the world's biggest problem: People don't #Believe in themselves enough. For over 22 years, Evan Carmichael has been dedicated to this mission. The way we're approaching this problem is producing inspirational content at scale. The right video at the right time can completely change someone's life and we want to touch as many lives as possible. People may not have a supportive family or community around them, but our content can help give them the belief they need to chase their dreams and make the world a better place. We want to work with people who also want to make an impact and touch people's lives. In your application, please put ‘I am your next awesome Video Editor!’ in the subject line. Please apply through OnlineJobsPh and not via
. The job responsibilities include editing the first minute of videos to grab and keep the audience's attention, selecting the most engaging clips, adding eye-catching transitions and effects, ensuring the sound and visuals are top-notch, and staying on top of the latest trends to keep things fresh.
